name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
5,974 is an important number to us.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221206-3682-header&t=1&akid=3682%2E2526796%2EAZcIK7)
5,974.
That’s how many contributions we need to reach before the end of the month when we’ll close our books and submit our fundraising numbers to the public.
**How did we get 5,974?** Based on our average gift for the year ($15.90) and how much we’ve raised so far, we need to hit 8,000 contributions this month to match what we raised last month.
Here’s where we are so far:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221206-3682-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3682%2E2526796%2EAZcIK7)
5,974 is an important number to us because each donation – **no matter the amount** – shows that our values, from Medicare for All to the Green New Deal, have strong support in your state and across the country.
[Can you be one of the 5,974 people we need to chip in this month to meet our goal and allow us to carry out all the programs Alexandria has planned?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221206-3682-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3682%2E2526796%2EAZcIK7)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221206-3682-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3682%2E2526796%2EAZcIK7)**
This goal is particularly important. On December 31, our numbers will be submitted to the FEC. Once they are made public, they will be examined by our opponents to determine the strength of this movement.
**Normally numbers tend to drop off after an election. We can’t let that happen.** The work we have to do is too great to only organize around elections.
Alexandria is one of the most heavily targeted members of Congress, whether it’s an election year or not. We know that next year will be no different, so it’s important that we raise resources early and demonstrate the strength of our campaign now.
Reaching 8,000 contributions and submitting a strong FEC report would demonstrate how much grassroots support Alexandria has beside her.
[Each donation we receive directly translates into growing our movement, so please – if you’re able – will you pitch in any amount to help us reach our goal?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221206-3682-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3682%2E2526796%2EAZcIK7)
Thank you for making all of this possible.
Team AOC

clean_body: 5,974 is an important number to us. 5,974. That’s how many contributions we need to reach before the end of the month when we’ll close our books and submit our fundraising numbers to the public. How did we get 5,974? Based on our average gift for the year ($15.90) and how much we’ve raised so far, we need to hit 8,000 contributions this month to match what we raised last month. Here’s where we are so far: 5,974 is an important number to us because each donation – no matter the amount – shows that our values, from Medicare for All to the Green New Deal, have strong support in your state and across the country. This goal is particularly important. On December 31, our numbers will be submitted to the FEC. Once they are made public, they will be examined by our opponents to determine the strength of this movement. Normally numbers tend to drop off after an election. We can’t let that happen. The work we have to do is too great to only organize around elections. Alexandria is one of the most heavily targeted members of Congress, whether it’s an election year or not. We know that next year will be no different, so it’s important that we raise resources early and demonstrate the strength of our campaign now. Reaching 8,000 contributions and submitting a strong FEC report would demonstrate how much grassroots support Alexandria has beside her. Thank you for making all of this possible. Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: The Democratic Party of Georgia
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
for all your hard work this year

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55645289/382325380/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGVlNmEwMy1jMzc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xFOs1RBDvrIRXg5zBOyMmrfaoszxuwE7o1xjbFp7ZNY=&emci=49e27ee2-b675-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=74ee6a03-c375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=43566853)

| | We wanted to take a moment this evening to thank you for being a supporter of the Democratic Party of Georgia.

Whether you were a grassroots donor, knocked doors, made phone calls, talked to friends, were a voter, attended our events, simply engaged with our emails, or helped out in any other way, your support means the world to us.

The Democratic Party of Georgia would not be in the position it is today without a grassroots team pulling for us every step of the way.

We wouldn’t have flipped the state blue in 2020 for President Biden and Vice President Harris. We wouldn’t have flipped two Senate seats and elected Jon Ossoff and Rev. Warnock in the 2021 runoffs. And we wouldn’t be here today, ready to re-elect Rev. Warnock, without the hundreds of thousands of supporters who power our team.

So we wanted to take a moment from all of the hectic bustle of an election day to say simply: _**thank you.**_

– The Democratic Party of Georgia
---
|
---

name: Brian Kemp
subject: This is going to be a turnout election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I am 100% behind Herschel Walker, and I am personally asking for your help to Get-Out-The-Vote. |
---
Fellow American,

Today's Senate runoff is going to be a turnout election.

This race will come down to who is more motivated - Raphael Warnock's team or OUR TEAM!

Fellow American, it's time to retire Raphael Warnock from the United States Senate - and the only way we can do that is if we help Herschel Walker **TODAY** turn out supporters to vote.

I am 100% behind Herschel, and I am personally asking for your help to Get-Out-The-Vote.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I stand with railroad workers.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Every worker deserves access to quality healthcare.
#
Peter,
In the past few weeks, we have witnessed the power of the railroad industry competing against the interests of working Americans. I want to make it abundantly clear that **I stand with railroad workers as they demand the basic right to paid sick leave — _a right every worker deserves._**
Railroad workers provide an essential service that benefits every single one of us – and yet, our proposal to guarantee even a week of paid sick leave to railroad workers failed in the Senate. **_Senators themselves enjoy unlimited paid sick leave — the hypocrisy is astounding._**
**In the House, it was progressives who used our collective power to negotiate a proposal that would address railroad unions’ core demands.** Our bloc is powerful, and we'll only continue to grow when more progressives than ever are seated in Congress next year.
[**I’m asking for your support so I can focus on fighting for working people and securing more of the progressive agenda with our caucus. Time is running out before the GOP takes control of the House — can I count on your donation now?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24752?refcode=em20221206-1927&t=1&akid=1927%2E420207%2EqMFU_d)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24752?refcode=em20221206-1927&t=20&akid=1927%2E420207%2EqMFU_d)**
**I will do everything in my power to ensure American workers’ demands are heard and their needs met.** It is time for us to stand up to industry and put people over profits.
Our progressive bloc is fighting for Medicare for All, but it’s just as important that our people can _actually access the quality healthcare we all deserve -- including through paid sick leave._
**Our country is one of the only wealthy nations in the world that doesn’t guarantee sick leave — we’re going to change that.** I promise to keep fighting for paid sick leave for railroad workers, and for all.
[**It’s my job to keep fighting to make Congress work for working people. Before our next session begins, will you step up and make a contribution to support our work?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24752?refcode=em20221206-1927&t=21&akid=1927%2E420207%2EqMFU_d)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24752?refcode=em20221206-1927&t=22&akid=1927%2E420207%2EqMFU_d)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221206-1927-footer&t=23&refcode2=1927_420207_qMFU_d&akid=1927%2E420207%2EqMFU_d)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=1927%2E420207%2EqMFU_d)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1927%2E420207%2EqMFU_d)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

**Tuesday, December 6th 2022** Friend, Minnesota government is overtaxing YOU by record amounts. We've been reporting about the enormous budget surplus for the last year, but today's report shows the problem is growing much, much worse. THOUSANDS UPON THOUSANDS OF DOLLARS THEY OWE YOU!!! We break down the numbers on today's show and tell you how much the government owes you today!

subject: 𝐒𝐢𝐠𝐧𝐞𝐝 𝐛𝐲: a proud Democrat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
BREAKING: Jan. 6 committee votes to subpoena Trump!!
| **BREAKING: Jan. 6 committee votes to subpoena Trump**

**FIRST:** The January 6th Committee held their first public hearing to expose Donald Trump’s treasonous crimes on Jan. 6th, 2021.

**THEN:** The committee voted to SUBPOENA Donald Trump for his crimes.. _AMAZING!!_

**NOW:** We need to send the Jan. 6th Committee a HUGE thank you note for their brave work.

[**We're sending a HUGE Thank You card to the January 6th Committee and we need your signature! We have 460 more spots open for Democrats in your state to sign – don’t wait, sign right now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37267?t=6&akid=5736%2E878179%2EXGlzww) | [DONATE $5 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37267?t=7&akid=5736%2E878179%2EXGlzww)
---
To: The January 6th Committee
From: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37267?t=8&akid=5736%2E878179%2EXGlzww) Dear January 6th Committee,

**Thank you** for exposing Donald Trump’s involvement in the January 6th attempted insurrection.

**Thank you** for doing what's right and voting unanimously to subpoena Donald Trump.

**Thank you** for spending countless hours combing over evidence to find the truth out that horrific day.

_**You make me proud to be an American.**_

I’m so proud that we have leaders like YOU who are working to give the American people the truth about the attack on our Democracy.

**The bravery you’ve shown in standing up for what’s right will go down in history.**

Despite the attacks you’ve endured and the censorship you’ve received, you’ve never wavered.

**So thank you. Our country is better because of your leadership.** [**Today, I’m signing this letter and making a donation to VPP to keep electing leaders like you all.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37267?t=9&akid=5736%2E878179%2EXGlzww) | [DONATE $5 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37267?t=10&akid=5736%2E878179%2EXGlzww)
---
Sincerely,

A Proud Democrat
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5736%2E878179%2EXGlzww). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5736%2E878179%2EXGlzww).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=5736%2E878179%2EXGlzww) to request fewer emails. **Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never.**
Friend,

The runoff election is less than 24 hours away.

We are trying to make every hour count, **but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be.**

We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us – even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow.

**Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history.**

We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff.

[** Help our Ground Game!
Chip in $5 → **](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxlkcGOmzAQhp_G3IzweIPJgUN2IVl122RF1W73hBzbBFe2YQ0U5e1rEK1UVbIs-ZuZ3zP_qJykLKEZScg-kjlPeaNkpHNIAAgkLAFKKIkBKBU7uO6bLEmbvUAPibJcm5iTmXvfdTYWnY3aPAOQ8irhSjiwB8WIyARnqYA0o0Jmu8jk7Tj2A6IHBMdwBiUmr-JZO6_kIhLYqLjFrfKDaJXB2onA_OS6psGymx3uzN32WmCP6HEabT10kxcK0cKrXwjSBQlue65vboFr5VK4xZYsWmwigVkl9WQDWkcKYBDhsTmwq5_L6uvTc_m5Lsv67VBVl8uXuvp2vhyPuLi8neuq_P6Hbx_8J7h21LlRuTFQJwxWh9eDmm7vP9oQrp3Rckn_F7ZaBp-KT6-sPb2Qx8jnsp-1MXpIWVjAbV3AYnuY1ejmniP2iADWMoDVYfh4n62fftqXEz7JAn-kZ7tbgvAU7vHeq7-Zm0i89QyIFb8BAE2rMw)

name: Brian Kemp
subject: We cannot rest on our laurels
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I am 100% behind Herschel Walker, and I am personally asking for your help to Get-Out-The-Vote. |
---
Peter,

Today's Senate runoff is going to be a turnout election.

This race will come down to who is more motivated - Raphael Warnock's team or OUR TEAM!

Peter, it's time to retire Raphael Warnock from the United States Senate - and the only way we can do that is if we help Herschel Walker **TODAY** turn out supporters to vote.

I am 100% behind Herschel, and I am personally asking for your help to Get-Out-The-Vote.

clean_body: I am 100% behind Herschel Walker, and I am personally asking for your help to Get-Out-The-Vote. | Fellow American, Today's Senate runoff is going to be a turnout election. This race will come down to who is more motivated - Raphael Warnock's team or OUR TEAM! Fellow American, it's time to retire Raphael Warnock from the United States Senate - and the only way we can do that is if we help Herschel Walker TODAY turn out supporters to vote. I am 100% behind Herschel, and I am personally asking for your help to Get-Out-The-Vote. I helped Team Herschel record one of their last campaign ads that's airing across the state. Now I want to help Herschel raise the final dollars he needs to fully fund a massive voter turnout effort. In Washington, Herschel Walker will row the boat in the same direction that we're rowing here in Georgia - and help get America back on track. Let's send Herschel to the United States Senate to protect Georgia's values and keep our state a wonderful place to live, work, and raise a family! Thank you, Brian Kemp Governor of Georgia | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: American Briefing
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq8dp0jr0sbegejhm14k96cohvt51s6asvehlro0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i60o74cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqq8hurgjqo3s0roemmg6m3qoubbtsn6s19tp7s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i60o74cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zii80aa59mehj9m28vdd1775c088998sui1kub8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i60o74cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztovnva8gqmnoffc9t8n057q2ji0hpbphf03scmo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c1gm8o30shie49fg)

body:
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.

Friend,
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.
We only asked a handful of our top Patriots to reply and need **100% participation** in order to fully represent our movement.
I'd hate to close the survey without hearing from you, so I'm giving you one final chance to submit your honest feedback. [**Can you submit your response to my Majority Leader Survey before 11:59 PM?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkbi7opqnuios2pg1icdfv1vhol1knvgd4fc5he8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i60o72c9h2bs)
I look forward to hearing from you, Friend.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
_Forwarded Message Below:_
**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM MAJORITY LEADER-ELECT STEVE SCALISE**

Hey Friend,
I just released my FIRST-EVER [**Majority Leader Survey**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0oel87tmbmh17j3t9beh3eqlqi80hj8stln0ubo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i60o72c9h2bs) and I want YOU to be in the first round of Patriots to submit their response.
[**My survey only takes a few minutes to complete, but I need your response by 11:59 PM tonight!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z01uhhlnbetsd26m2bclv941ri8s8osk2tq7ilr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i60o72c9h2bs) Consider this your opportunity to be open and honest with Congressional leaders.
******[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znltkdchbj4ouadgjb7ro7ra10lnhfvjpf90eibo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i60o72c9h2bs)**
It's critical I get your response before then because I'm meeting with top Republican leaders before our legislative deadline. Without your feedback, I'll be powerless to change our agenda in Washington.
I look forward to reading your response.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Shaping how kids see the world
body:
Do you know what might be the most influential factor in most kids’ lives today? [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0146%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=y%2bvZ9%2bSJGevOTYIj5A1luA&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42990%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=etPrK62fH2qCaVFO7gKhFQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Do you know what might be the most influential factor in most kids’ lives today?

Here’s a hint--it’s where they spend most of their day: school. And that’s a sobering thought.

Many public schools throughout America are pushing socialism and woke-ism into the minds of our nation’s kids every single day.

These schools deliberately work these radical messages into their curriculum. And unfortunately, this includes some teachers who see their job as “activism” to spread leftist ideas and encourage children to think like they do.
---
| | That’s why it shouldn’t come as a surprise that more young people are feeling ashamed of their country, voting for socialist candidates, and depending on the government to meet their needs. This is exactly what they’re being taught in school on a daily basis!

As you can imagine, parents are fed up. An increasing number are pushing back against the propaganda being spread in our public schools, including the selection of books in school libraries that does nothing to counter these socialist messages.

But while the debate rages on about what books need to be removed from public school libraries, it’s even more important to put books into our libraries that teach kids the principles and value of liberty.

That’s exactly what our award-winning book series _The Tuttle Twins_ is designed to do. With over 4 million copies sold, parents throughout the country have seen the effects that these books have on their kids. And because they are translated into a dozen languages, even more kids can use these books to learn about liberty, the Constitution, American history, free market economics, and more.

**Right now, our team has made it a priority to get our ****_Tuttle Twins_**** books into every public school library. To help us accomplish this, we have set a goal to raise $50,000 by December 31.** This would allow us to place a full set of _Tuttle Twins_ books into 200 different public schools. Or, it would provide access to copies of _The Tuttle Twins_ books in 200 public school libraries throughout America.
That means we could help over 175,000 students learn the principles of freedom!
But in order to do this critical work, we need your help. **
Will you support our efforts --and help us reach our goal--by making a tax-deductible donation right now using the secure link below?**
[https://secure.libertas.org/cye-donate/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42991%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QrvjtTpRK8TJn2kg%2b4wYoA&sysid=1)

While not every book in a library is bad, some of them are just plain boring. That’s why _The Tuttle Twins_ books are such a critical addition to our schools and their libraries. Kids LOVE these books because they learn valuable principles that they can use throughout their entire lives in a fun and engaging way.

clean_body: Do you know what might be the most influential factor in most kids’ lives today? | | | | | Dear Friend, Do you know what might be the most influential factor in most kids’ lives today? Here’s a hint--it’s where they spend most of their day: school. And that’s a sobering thought. Many public schools throughout America are pushing socialism and woke-ism into the minds of our nation’s kids every single day. These schools deliberately work these radical messages into their curriculum. And unfortunately, this includes some teachers who see their job as “activism” to spread leftist ideas and encourage children to think like they do. | | That’s why it shouldn’t come as a surprise that more young people are feeling ashamed of their country, voting for socialist candidates, and depending on the government to meet their needs. This is exactly what they’re being taught in school on a daily basis! As you can imagine, parents are fed up. An increasing number are pushing back against the propaganda being spread in our public schools, including the selection of books in school libraries that does nothing to counter these socialist messages. But while the debate rages on about what books need to be removed from public school libraries, it’s even more important to put books into our libraries that teach kids the principles and value of liberty. That’s exactly what our award-winning book series The Tuttle Twins is designed to do. With over 4 million copies sold, parents throughout the country have seen the effects that these books have on their kids. Right now, our team has made it a priority to get our Tuttle Twins books into every public school library. To help us accomplish this, we have set a goal to raise $50,000 by December 31. This would allow us to place a full set of Tuttle Twins books into 200 different public schools. name: Deroy Murdock
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9djp4lg13512g7hghptqu54jp6l93qqlrtdjeh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i64or6c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhrgo3gaoura597j74epd7ni0rulq4smmvbo04fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i64or6c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z38tbjefdkkljib821j8n9a806g96ekkij1ou240_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i64or6c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpt2j65va3cdp4det5hcvrao7juqagulvfj6n0u8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i64or6c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: American Defense News
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6cjtnl8d2vb222ukrjn1sh3fl72mn8k3eitfrr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i66oj4c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z51bbhhnu3ikitun85urv42shnjaoetag2s5tdq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i66oj4c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9tobfs61v5di2nd1p6cpian2pl3u2kl7fqn9i98_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i66oj4c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zevbbvoaaooqvl9pdtdj1pqck8068s4qkb3jkcn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i66oj4c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Shaping how kids see the world
body:
Do you know what might be the most influential factor in most kids’ lives today?
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1e7dkmg25u239j0sra3upptmdnpkvutuko4odq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i66oj4cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Do you know what might be the most influential factor in most kids’ lives today?

Here’s a hint--it’s where they spend most of their day: school. And that’s a sobering thought.

Many public schools throughout America are pushing socialism and woke-ism into the minds of our nation’s kids every single day.

These schools deliberately work these radical messages into their curriculum. And unfortunately, this includes some teachers who see their job as “activism” to spread leftist ideas and encourage children to think like they do.
---
| | That’s why it shouldn’t come as a surprise that more young people are feeling ashamed of their country, voting for socialist candidates, and depending on the government to meet their needs. This is exactly what they’re being taught in school on a daily basis!

As you can imagine, parents are fed up. An increasing number are pushing back against the propaganda being spread in our public schools, including the selection of books in school libraries that does nothing to counter these socialist messages.

But while the debate rages on about what books need to be removed from public school libraries, it’s even more important to put books into our libraries that teach kids the principles and value of liberty.

That’s exactly what our award-winning book series _The Tuttle Twins_ is designed to do. With over 4 million copies sold, parents throughout the country have seen the effects that these books have on their kids. And because they are translated into a dozen languages, even more kids can use these books to learn about liberty, the Constitution, American history, free market economics, and more.

**Right now, our team has made it a priority to get our ****_Tuttle Twins_**** books into every public school library. To help us accomplish this, we have set a goal to raise $50,000 by December 31.** This would allow us to place a full set of _Tuttle Twins_ books into 200 different public schools. Or, it would provide access to copies of _The Tuttle Twins_ books in 200 public school libraries throughout America.
That means we could help over 175,000 students learn the principles of freedom!
But in order to do this critical work, we need your help. **
Will you support our efforts --and help us reach our goal--by making a tax-deductible donation right now using the secure link below?**
[https://secure.libertas.org/cye-donate/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5he4i2cljen2gagdlgl3gbdlo2t0andicmb34k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i66oj4cph2bs)

While not every book in a library is bad, some of them are just plain boring. That’s why _The Tuttle Twins_ books are such a critical addition to our schools and their libraries. Kids LOVE these books because they learn valuable principles that they can use throughout their entire lives in a fun and engaging way.
Please make your donation today to help more children learn the true story of America and the value of liberty using this secure link: [https://secure.libertas.org/cye-donate/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z66i79ih8np5isi1pr430bs5lr7dma8a1d1gvjp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i66oj4cph2bs)

Best,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute

P.S. Early education is one of the primary ways to shape the way kids see the world. That’s why we must work fast to reach as many kids as possible in 2023. Click the secure link to help us reach our $50,000 goal and put more _Tuttle Twins_ books into our schools and libraries: [https://secure.libertas.org/cye-donate/ ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z09v80h3ceoen0s363n5jgksn62o2vstea8j18lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i66oj4cph2bs)

---
| | 2183 W Main St, Lehi, UT 84043, USA
Libertas Institute
---

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Save my son from the woke mob
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0141%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Y%2fo1U9L8SHUI2SWhWHlnkA&sysid=1)
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42905%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s4COUCSV%2f7Yn%2f844ex6x4w&sysid=1)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42906%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7RmTBmXKz9xl8Pa%2fWpjRUA&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42906%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7RmTBmXKz9xl8Pa%2fWpjRUA&sysid=1)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It’s been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn’t expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it’s all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor’s office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael’s back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael’s_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42907%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QlsZ6ztK1hB2YgwXXtXClA&sysid=1)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42908%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sBIwU8v6HQC%2bEsar77uALw&sysid=1)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42909%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KcgakDI3wFNhAMXf8jUjcw&sysid=1)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42900%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=on5xPubHtDarHdEyn4zj5g&sysid=1)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42901%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bnZp6gccD2Cltl4ATreTow&sysid=1)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42902%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L18%2ftDHG1xNHszQqOlXRaQ&sysid=1)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42903%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1SjefrWsoGxz2%2bcyTlKGow&sysid=1)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we’re defending, please visit**www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0141%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Y%2fo1U9L8SHUI2SWhWHlnkA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0141%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Y%2fo1U9L8SHUI2SWhWHlnkA&sysid=1)

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Don’t let the Media steal another election
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62037983:6XC1-oGNY:m:1:3331421248:AAE3E936BB36AFAB75CC9734017E45D5:r)
Peter,

The media's bias against Republicans is on full display this election.

Why is biased media so dangerous? Here's an example.

Four years ago, TV's midterm coverage hammered **Republican candidates and then-President Trump with 88% negative spin** while sparing Democrats similarly bad press.

This year, Democrats are in charge of the White House and both chambers of Congress. However, a new Media Research Center study of ABC, CBS, and NBC evening newscasts finds that **Republicans still receive 87% negative news coverage. **

All the while, Democrats -- including the President -- are drawing far less scrutiny than the party out of power.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, and I'm the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

Peter, I've set a goal to raise $25,000 to STOP media bias and corruption.

[_**Can I count on you to join the fight by sending an urgent gift today? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62037983:6XC1-oGNY:m:1:3331421248:AAE3E936BB36AFAB75CC9734017E45D5:r)

This year, the Big Three evening newscasts aired 115 stories that mentioned or discussed the midterm elections, with a total airtime of 213 minutes, or about 60 percent more than the 130 minutes we tallied four years ago.

Here's what we found:

* **Burying Biden**

Four years ago, President Trump accounted for 48% of all midterm campaign airtime in 2018, more than all of the individual House, Senate, and gubernatorial candidates combined.

But the networks aren't interested in targeting President Biden this year. _Biden accounted for just 34 minutes of midterm coverage_ , just 16% of total campaign coverage.

* **Blasting Republicans**

This fall, Democrats, including President Biden, drew 13 positive comments vs. 26 negative ones for a **67% negative spin. **

That's not great, but not nearly as bad as Republicans. They received 94 negative comments vs. 14 positive statements, **a spin score of 87% negative** -- and virtually identical to the 88% negative spin for the whole GOP (including Trump) in 2018.

* **Showcasing Democrats ' Agenda**

While voters consistently ranked the economy and inflation as the most important issues this fall, the broadcast networks' campaign coverage instead emphasized the agenda favored by Democratic consultants.

Thus, the economy was only the fifth-most cited issue within these midterm stories, with 15 minutes of airtime. That's barely half of the time spent on anonymous and unverified allegations that GOP candidate Herschel Walker paid for two women's abortions years ago, _charges Walker has vehemently denied_.

[_**Join the fight against media bias! Just click here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62037983:6XC1-oGNY:m:1:3331421248:AAE3E936BB36AFAB75CC9734017E45D5:r)

As the Senate majority lingers on in the Georgia run-off election, we can't let the media steal the race from voters.

Here's the breakdown of the Left's coverage of issues during the midterm coverage:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62037983:6XC1-oGNY:m:1:3331421248:AAE3E936BB36AFAB75CC9734017E45D5:r)

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

But we can't do this alone, Peter. Can I count on you to join the fight for the truth? Click below to donate.

name: Art
subject: Three things to know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

The Supreme Court will be hearing oral argument for _Moore v. Harper_ today. Here are three things you should know about this case.

#1) Republicans will be basing their argument on the “independent state legislature” (ISL) theory -- a far-fetched legal theory that claims that state legislatures are the **_ONLY_** state entities with the power to regulate federal elections.

#2) If the Supreme Court sides with the power-hungry politicians in this case, the fair congressional map in North Carolina will be replaced with the gerrymandered map that the state court deemed unconstitutional.

#3) Worst case scenario, the ISL theory opens the door for power grabs by anti-democratic advocates and elected officials in other gerrymandered states. By claiming that state legislatures have exclusive power over federal elections, extremists in Republican state legislatures could effectively nullify state constitutional provisions that protect voters.

As A.G. Holder said, this should not be a difficult decision for the Supreme Court -- endorsing the ISL theory would [**"damage a cornerstone of our democracy"**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55649866/382363866/-1462679232?source=20221207_AOTL_F_mvh2_ActivesxSigners&refcode=20221207_AOTL_F_mvh2_ActivesxSigners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiNDFkNjIzLTMxNzYtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=utQ6UH1H2n59VXvdsUPIl49C_tl5Aty9WjDG2IAXZRs=&emci=37aa14e3-b475-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=1b41d623-3176-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8431045) and [**"unleash" gerrymandering from both parties.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55649867/382363867/-1462679232?source=20221207_AOTL_F_mvh2_ActivesxSigners&refcode=20221207_AOTL_F_mvh2_ActivesxSigners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiNDFkNjIzLTMxNzYtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=utQ6UH1H2n59VXvdsUPIl49C_tl5Aty9WjDG2IAXZRs=&emci=37aa14e3-b475-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=1b41d623-3176-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8431045)

**[Before SCOTUS hears oral argument today, add your name to our petition if you believe SCOTUS should uphold checks and balances in redistricting.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55649868/382363868/-1462679232?source=20221207_AOTL_F_mvh2_ActivesxSigners&refcode=20221207_AOTL_F_mvh2_ActivesxSigners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiNDFkNjIzLTMxNzYtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=utQ6UH1H2n59VXvdsUPIl49C_tl5Aty9WjDG2IAXZRs=&emci=37aa14e3-b475-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=1b41d623-3176-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8431045)**

Extreme Republicans are relentless in their attacks on our elections -- putting their ISL theory into practice would be an unfathomable threat to our democracy.

We’re doing a lot of work to make sure that activists, legal experts, the media, and partner organizations understand what’s at stake -- and are prepared for the potential fallout of this decision. We appreciate your support!

\-- Art

Art Mitchell
Deputy Director, Litigation and Policy

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

Here are three things you should know about this case. #1) Republicans will be basing their argument on the “independent state legislature” (ISL) theory -- a far-fetched legal theory that claims that state legislatures are the ONLY state entities with the power to regulate federal elections. #2) If the Supreme Court sides with the power-hungry politicians in this case, the fair congressional map in North Carolina will be replaced with the gerrymandered map that the state court deemed unconstitutional. #3) Worst case scenario, the ISL theory opens the door for power grabs by anti-democratic advocates and elected officials in other gerrymandered states. By claiming that state legislatures have exclusive power over federal elections, extremists in Republican state legislatures could effectively nullify state constitutional provisions that protect voters. As A.G. Holder said, this should not be a difficult decision for the Supreme Court -- endorsing the ISL theory would and Extreme Republicans are relentless in their attacks on our elections -- putting their ISL theory into practice would be an unfathomable threat to our democracy. We’re doing a lot of work to make sure that activists, legal experts, the media, and partner organizations understand what’s at stake -- and are prepared for the potential fallout of this decision. We appreciate your support! \-- Art Art Mitchell Deputy Director, Litigation and Policy All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600, Washington, D.C. 20005 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z73cibv61gfh4rifbcuebjatao08h5cnibep5238_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i61o34clh2bs)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd8abecq3aembcfds4ldeo1tlcs3kp1cmcku7ajo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i61o34clh2bs)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil.** He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

[**Please dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away to help fuel all of my critically important fights on behalf of the January 6 peaceful protesters.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsfrcgbftj0b8qev7p491kubnmkkc72i4sujh1vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i61o34clh2bs)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmkhad9s0evsum54v25hppe6v637vsghl6u8bp20_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i69o72c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze118u26i27dfl1imi8jfggkt6vta09v64b8scl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i69o72c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg8fdrfrc4e2q0m60flpp2qnhoj7svag01d6vo6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i69o72c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm940iuqc2rs00uukdrgu8mdvqenefi2sm05oa28_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5i69o72c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Your America
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7560%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2fNekHIw2ukFIM8oTO1KRfA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95437%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XIo8lBgpGh9ynsQniKvilw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95438%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IcFv51OFZBWz%2fDmp9c2m4w&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95439%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bZOGIE26G3hMwXZrMx3WKg&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7560%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2fNekHIw2ukFIM8oTO1KRfA&sysid=1)_

name: Sign the petition (Left Action)
subject: Tell Republicans: "Defend the Constitution from Trump, or resign"
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
## [Tell Republicans: "You took an oath. Defend the Constitution from Trump, or resign!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfdf5597c-414b-4b79-83a5-a2979a0a38e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7679357e-4f0c-45aa-adc5-48914db7b7a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Want to unsubscribe? Use the link at the bottom)_ When new members are sworn in to the Senate or House, they take an oath to "[support and defend the Constitution](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbe4f9555-0e1c-4d20-a6bc-194a7feefb72/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)."

**But when Donald Trump called for "terminating" the Constitution, Republican members were silent.**

If Republicans are too spineless to defend the Constitution, and stand up to Trump, they need to resign, and do it right now.

[**Tell Republicans in Congress: "You took an oath to defend the Constitution. Do it, or resign."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T51a0349a-95a3-4db7-a389-03cdf2550e63/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Already took this action? Take this one:

[Tell Republicans: "I don't give a damn about Hunter Biden's laptop!" >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T776c1597-0093-401b-8b6e-c60f70e28968/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Response (missing) -- House GOP Alerts
subject: Your help is key to ending Socialism in America.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress********
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040093:6hRoKoGmN:m:1:3331703221:A3CC020F0DBD9D6E9F1207CC7B03F8C2:r)
---

Peter,

Is socialism the solution to saving our country? Well, according to Democrats, it is.

---

| **[SAY NO TO SOCIALISM!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040093:6hRoKoGmN:m:1:3331703221:A3CC020F0DBD9D6E9F1207CC7B03F8C2:r)**
---

❌ Record high inflation rates
❌ New taxes and tax increases
❌ Out-of-control government spending
❌ Government overreach
❌ Destruction of small businesses

If we let Democrats continue to push their Socialist agenda in Congress, it will destroy **ALL** of the freedom and opportunities that Americans strive for.

Hardworking families would be left in the dust, small businesses would be destroyed, and our country will sink further into debt and recession.

We have to hear from you, though. **[Will you sign our petition to say NO to socialism?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040093:6hRoKoGmN:m:1:3331703221:A3CC020F0DBD9D6E9F1207CC7B03F8C2:r "Will you sign our petition to say NO to socialism?")**

---

| **[SAY NO TO SOCIALISM!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040093:6hRoKoGmN:m:1:3331703221:A3CC020F0DBD9D6E9F1207CC7B03F8C2:r)**
---
**[SAY NO TO SOCIALISM!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040093:6hRoKoGmN:m:1:3331703221:A3CC020F0DBD9D6E9F1207CC7B03F8C2:r)**
---

Thank you for your feedback,

House GOP Alerts
---
* * *
****
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040094:6hRoKoGmN:m:1:3331703221:A3CC020F0DBD9D6E9F1207CC7B03F8C2:r)

Michelle Steel here. My story is like many Americans, it's an immigrant story.

Growing up, I heard of the horrors of communism from my parents, who had fled North Korea. We didn't have much growing up, but I worked hard and learned English, making it my third language. My mom and dad encouraged me to dream of a better life - **and I did. I became an American.**

I've spent my whole life fighting for the American Dream, and I won't stop. But now, that dream is under attack.
****
****
**[**Please consider chipping in today to help me continue defending Conservative values.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040094:6hRoKoGmN:m:1:3331703221:A3CC020F0DBD9D6E9F1207CC7B03F8C2:r)

**If we don 't act now, the American Dream may be lost forever.**** And I think you agree that America _is worth fighting for._
****
[ ****DONATE**** **** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040094:6hRoKoGmN:m:1:3331703221:A3CC020F0DBD9D6E9F1207CC7B03F8C2:r)
---
****

"Will you sign our petition to say NO to socialism?" | Thank you for your feedback, House GOP Alerts Michelle Steel here. My story is like many Americans, it's an immigrant story. Growing up, I heard of the horrors of communism from my parents, who had fled North Korea. We didn't have much growing up, but I worked hard and learned English, making it my third language. My mom and dad encouraged me to dream of a better life - and I did. I became an American. I've spent my whole life fighting for the American Dream, and I won't stop. But now, that dream is under attack. If we don 't act now, the American Dream may be lost forever. And I think you agree that America is worth fighting for. ****Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress**** ****16027 Brookhurst Street, Suite I #428 Fountain Valley, CA 92708**** ** ** ** ****** ** This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 9, 2022. For more information . | mailto:unsub-52293197632-echo7-485B0371E3E7FD9BEA09975D86C91DF7@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: American Update
subject: It’s ready to ship to you
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0149%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=P1Wf4YNErwEGy8wPcpi2PA&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42915%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a4igWE1J8y5HtkbRLvzAYQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story--especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42916%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bBG7EfxEhWGq8XE7RaWj9g&sysid=1)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42917%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JZrJuS4zYIWbzmzJ0%2bkzZg&sysid=1)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42916%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bBG7EfxEhWGq8XE7RaWj9g&sysid=1)**

Young voters across Georgia turned out and delivered a huge progressive victory for the U.S. Senate (again). Because of young voters, Reverend Raphael Warnock will head back to the U.S. Senate to represent Georgia. Senator Warnock will work for **all of us** as he fights to protect and expand our right to abortion, raise the national minimum wage, tackle climate change, and so much more. **[When we work together, we’re unstoppable. Volunteer with us now as we continue to build a government that reflects, respects, and represents us.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55656060/382389753/738034940?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGNlZjhjZC0zZjc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=737mXpVuxOpGmexpQgw_eqvTBn7Y8JCqqx_AMq4mEcA=&emci=f6c4f75a-eb74-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=0dcef8cd-3f76-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=6787172)** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55656061/382389756/-828049001?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGNlZjhjZC0zZjc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=737mXpVuxOpGmexpQgw_eqvTBn7Y8JCqqx_AMq4mEcA=&emci=f6c4f75a-eb74-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=0dcef8cd-3f76-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55656062/382389757/-828049001?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGNlZjhjZC0zZjc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=737mXpVuxOpGmexpQgw_eqvTBn7Y8JCqqx_AMq4mEcA=&emci=f6c4f75a-eb74-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=0dcef8cd-3f76-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=6787172) We can’t overstate the importance of the youth vote. Because of young voters, we put a stop to Republican attempts to move Georgia backward, and **secured a progressive hold on our 51st seat in the Senate. ** Democrats in the Senate now have an even greater chance to deliver for the youth agenda. **This isn’t just a win for Georgia — it’s a win for the entire country. ** And in the next few days, we’re going to make sure every vote is counted to ensure that every single voice has been heard. **This win is yours.** Today, we’re taking a moment to acknowledge the tireless work of our youth volunteers, organizers, and activists across the country. clean_body: | | Friend, We owe this win to you. Young voters across Georgia turned out and delivered a huge progressive victory for the U.S. Senate (again). Because of young voters, Reverend Raphael Warnock will head back to the U.S. Senate to represent Georgia. Senator Warnock will work for all of us as he fights to protect and expand our right to abortion, raise the national minimum wage, tackle climate change, and so much more. We can’t overstate the importance of the youth vote. Because of young voters, we put a stop to Republican attempts to move Georgia backward, and secured a progressive hold on our 51st seat in the Senate. Democrats in the Senate now have an even greater chance to deliver for the youth agenda. This isn’t just a win for Georgia — it’s a win for the entire country. And in the next few days, we’re going to make sure every vote is counted to ensure that every single voice has been heard. This win is yours. Today, we’re taking a moment to acknowledge the tireless work of our youth volunteers, organizers, and activists across the country. Tomorrow, we’re getting right back to it — we’re just getting started. | "Sign up to text" Thank you, NextGen PAC | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. =
