name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: BREAKING: It's Public Today! Big Announcement....
body:
"Pastor, Businessman, and former Oklahoma United States Senate candidate Jackson Lahmeyer has started a nationwide effort to connect Christian faith l
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9090.1.61af5f064d3e7de71f0ea64fab329533)
---
_"Pastor, Businessman, and former Oklahoma United States Senate candidate Jackson Lahmeyer has started a nationwide effort to connect Christian faith leaders with the America First movement helping to secure another term for President Donald J. Trump in 2024._ _TULSA, Okla., Dec. 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Counting a chapter in each state and the backing of dozens of Christian pastors with over 200,000 congregants, Pastors for Trump (PFT) is aiming to galvanize support in the evangelical community for President Trump as he seeks to return to the White House as Commander-in-Chief in 2024."_ Read the full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9091.1.32e6c15763e81919a351e67f3a07bb22)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9092.1.f5231d8c813de5479fd430fbe1715f7f) For the last several months, I have been working with **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** across the country to lay the infrastructure for a _NEW_ coalition designed to help get **President Donald J. Trump** elected in 2024. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations and backgrounds but having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ that will host prominent leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. The Prayer Calls are not limited to just **Pastors or Ministry Leaders** but to all Christians throughout the country. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9093.1.fdaab472a3b91ec54588d6c06474bfa3) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9094.1.a666fb07c2315ee5fa317b3b5d250091) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9095.1.2d6747d2d4be26d6028115c41ccd3023) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9096.1.22472022365173f74d30b6197a7bb20f) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9097.1.4eb8e971551176bdb6b7f9d31c131a02), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9098.1.6bf0e45709bccf89ba1bfcd6f572b62c), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9099.1.8bbaa4dc9ddf5ef9fefab76c34d461ca), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9100.1.da224560ab7849bd3493c87222e3afb6), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9101.1.0f508eb89a55ff564dfe6d83ae78c46e) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9102.1.063c13280619b5a6c3891faebe9ca232)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9103.1.3ee36da9c2785209d1a82fa22c732009)
---
---
## You Need To Be Apart Of This
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9104.1.e44e04a6c9c88fd0512de19cf527aa2e)
---
[Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9105.1.8dda1238c2eafbba48bf5a8adf58f321) is a 1 year intensive program consisting of 12 courses divided between 2 semesters. Classes are offered in-person & online.
_"Study to show yourself approved to God, a worker who does not need to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth"_ \- **2 Timothy 2:15**
Enrolling in [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9106.1.be4bdf302185bb8e8232dfaa320b1631) is not something you will regret. We have intentionally made tuition VERY inexpensive: $300 per semester.
**Fall Semester** :
\- Old Testament Introduction
\- New Testament Introduction
\- Theology of Worship
\- Church History 1
\- Faith & Prayer
\- Spiritual Growth
**Spring Semester** :
\- Christian Theology
\- Pauline Epistles
\- Apologetics
\- Church History 2
\- Leadership & Ethics
\- Evangelism & Outreach
Classes for the Spring 2023 Semester begin January 17. Enroll today at [www.sheridan.church/biblecollege](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9107.1.ab4f1e8481c0671da613db7aa6ac2dff)
| | [ Sheridan Bible College ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9108.1.091999246f3c55b342c93206d4bc8d76)
---
---
## The Power Of God
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9109.1.0f833fdfb0e2cd28244c3addec78854a)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9110.1.b4e443e4a44b726f6a9b84e5ccd54bcb), I preached on the Power of God which is the **Holy Spirit**.
Check out this sermon at: [https://youtu.be/RDEi4UX4MAE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9111.1.1eeeff92d6ead344e0021d441e8a01f3)
Also, I have started a new series on Wednesday nights at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9112.1.eb2b394a05d6d916a10e5b1838232e0e) over the **Book of Revelation**.
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9113.1.cb61e4024746ce0e16e344690480295f)
---
We are taking our time through the **Book of Revelation** by going verse by verse.
Watch Pt. 1 here: [https://youtu.be/oPfmX_Aus-M?t=2](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9114.1.d84f7f3ef135f7ec44f5aa7193c7cd47)
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15617537.9115.1.3f04081e44a85680cf3e8c44cd4a1e75)
---
---

We just made history in Georgia, friend:
**In 2020, Rev. Raphael Warnock won his pivotal race to flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Last night, he won reelection — securing this critical seat for another six years and expanding Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority.**
It's been a privilege to work alongside a strong moral leader like Rev. Warnock — the kind of leader we need more of in Washington. With so many important fights ahead of us — from voting rights to reproductive freedom — his voice is absolutely invaluable in our continued push for justice and progress.
**That's why I'm asking you to join me in congratulating Rev. Warnock on his historic victory. This grassroots team has done so much to help keep Georgia blue, so I hope you’ll sign your****name beside mine before midnight.**
**[Please, will you sign the card now to congratulate Rev. Raphael Warnock on holding Georgia's critical Senate seat and expanding our Democratic majority? clean_body: Background on Georgia's Senate runoff election [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] Election Day is here for Georgia's Senate runoff between Warnock and Walker [] Source: ABC News [] In Georgia, the stage is set for the final Senate battle of the midterm election as voters head back to the polls on Tuesday for the runoff election between Democratic incumbent Raphael Warnock and Republican Herschel Walker. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [=] 2021-09-23 Judicial Watch Sues for Information on Justice Department’s Challenge to Georgia’s Voter Integrity Bill [=] Source: Judicial Watch [=] Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit against the Justice Department for communications between the DOJ and various left-wing groups and individuals concerning the DOJ’s decision to challenge Georgia’s election integrity law. [13x13x1] [=] READ MORE [=] [180x150x2] [==] 2022-12-06 Judicial Watch Monitors Georgia Election Polls During Senate Run-Off Election [==] Source: Judicial Watch [==] Judicial Watch announced today that as part of its ongoing election integrity efforts volunteer poll observers will monitor polling sites in Georgia on Run-Off Election Day. “Georgia has improved its election system in recent years but, as we saw in Maricopa County, Arizona, many problems can pop up,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. [13x13x1] [==] READ MORE [==] [180x150x3] [] 2021-01-05 More Than 4,700 of Georgia’s Absentee Votes in November 2020 Election Tied to Non-Residential Addresses [] Source: Judicial Watch [] udicial Watch announced that Georgia voter data shows over 4,700 absentee voters in the presidential election listed non-residential addresses as their places of residence. Judicial Watch shared its data with the Georgia Secretary of State and requested an investigation. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [Contribute] [==] [32x32x1] [=] [32x32x2] [=] [32x32x3] [=] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2022, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [=] |

name: Candace Owens
subject: I’m tired of criminal idols
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040313:6e3choGNJ:m:1:3253819041:EF0E0F8B39F48470EDA52F839B553D35:r)

Peter,

The media has turned a criminal drug addict into an icon.

But I don't care about idolizing a criminal.

**He was no saint -- he died of a fentanyl overdose. **

Nothing more.

Still, the Media used him as an excuse to gather mobs and burn down cities.

But the Media is trying to cancel me because I am speaking the TRUTH about George Floyd and his death.

**Peter, I am not afraid of the media. The truth is more important than their lies and indoctrination.**

Above all else, I want to fight for the truth. And I exposed the truth about George Floyd in my new documentary, _**The Greatest Lie Ever Sold.**_

I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to help Black and urban communities EXIT from the victimhood mentality. [_**Can you help fight for the truth and stop media lies by chipping in? Click here to send a gift >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040313:6e3choGNJ:m:1:3253819041:EF0E0F8B39F48470EDA52F839B553D35:r)

The media teaches us to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, and that racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

Our communities learn to hate and fear the police while the media lifts up criminals as icons.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040313:6e3choGNJ:m:1:3253819041:EF0E0F8B39F48470EDA52F839B553D35:r)

**Victimhood is a mental virus that infects our Black and minority communities. We need to eradicate it. **

[_**Click here to help eradicate the victimhood mentality >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040313:6e3choGNJ:m:1:3253819041:EF0E0F8B39F48470EDA52F839B553D35:r)

BLEXIT's programs empower minorities to pursue the American Dream and shape their own futures.

**BLEXIT Chapters** bring our mission to life in their communities through local events and programs.

They serve as the arms and legs of BLEXIT on the ground. They work with urban, minority, and at-risk communities to demonstrate and communicate our message.

**The BLEXIT Leadership Academy** focuses on fostering and growing the numerous BLEXIT leaders within the organization.

We provide opportunities for people to learn skills they wouldn't otherwise. These are skills they can utilize to benefit their communities or for their personal development.

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

**These programs help Black and urban communities to EXIT the victimhood mentality and become victors.**

What are victors?

Victors are individuals who think for themselves and promote a healthy community of Faith, Freedom, and Family.

Peter, you can be the reason for someone's BLEXIT? **Click below to send your gift.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040314:6e3choGNJ:m:1:3253819041:EF0E0F8B39F48470EDA52F839B553D35:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040315:6e3choGNJ:m:1:3253819041:EF0E0F8B39F48470EDA52F839B553D35:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040316:6e3choGNJ:m:1:3253819041:EF0E0F8B39F48470EDA52F839B553D35:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040317:6e3choGNJ:m:1:3253819041:EF0E0F8B39F48470EDA52F839B553D35:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040318:6e3choGNJ:m:1:3253819041:EF0E0F8B39F48470EDA52F839B553D35:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040319:6e3choGNJ:m:1:3253819041:EF0E0F8B39F48470EDA52F839B553D35:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040320:6e3choGNJ:m:1:3253819041:EF0E0F8B39F48470EDA52F839B553D35:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040321:6e3choGNJ:m:1:3253819041:EF0E0F8B39F48470EDA52F839B553D35:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62040313:6e3choGNJ:m:1:3253819041:EF0E0F8B39F48470EDA52F839B553D35:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

name: American Action News
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z08fm6fqj6v7j9rr88d2dv813otch6j49kmml5lo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5j66pr2c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlr58cuk8vamsakqlsdhst6s8oj110jluf79ej4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5j66pr2c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm6d3ka134scradrnjv0jao2si85pnacjeh8fom0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5j66pr2c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zghl8j8niqa5r5j7k3ll5khr3vs6af7dao0r3nf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5j66pr2c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
This is a critical time to advance freedom in America—so let’s head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselv
|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmiqqegnp2m0bfsle938h9fqka066svua2usnfo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5j6eo74c3h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

Affirm your support for America's guiding values and help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za0dv543i8o8ii86btcr75as2tpkr5dr8edrk95o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5j6eo74c3h2bs)
__**[**Join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zid53mmp6q6m0oc7ava8mes7rlcs9gpheogl6i28_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5j6eo74c3h2bs), which reads:**

* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjgno1ti9cd1ujkcb990ejh4fnpc1td2c58nia9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5j6eo74c3h2bs)

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=25490b0c2fff4604b3ecdf77e7fd1485&_e=2L0SpWSWOXMSJrY5gmd9zj6HIJiNBWK9PMf4LPHob32JPOyqtC1obvBAF3N_USC6btP77vzNztG9EbpBB2oAaBaYpNJal9uBROj_rEp_x4QZrvHjelF4LODqJiYkg7HMWpzNUqfLa5tAs4iWdpeSUbLjryUcGz0410bd2SyK-qRUMG2eONeUXN1rMw38C2rXFbs-vkHIGIDmO3ExsEOr8K65nJ347U0hxDvGXabRFLxaJFg23qxK-wZKqa91osWhxc4xTNKNwripiFLG94i_0M96RNTMgvc69-hpNP5PbXRC8FTHBq-LQDqjm8oKdrRKj_EJwxafU1wStGfOkyXcBAV6tkzn7mZgffgLHib20Sa0YpqNH5-F5NBCszB5K0FyzYOYfBpXE91DuK4Uocr9Mlzc_prhKiYAs2pGp9b8-w5jlQoEP2fs_bAlA7gSa9MH)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=25490b0c2fff4604b3ecdf77e7fd1485&_e=2L0SpWSWOXMSJrY5gmd9zj6HIJiNBWK9PMf4LPHob32JPOyqtC1obvBAF3N_USC6btP77vzNztG9EbpBB2oAaBaYpNJal9uBROj_rEp_x4QZrvHjelF4LODqJiYkg7HMWpzNUqfLa5tAs4iWdpeSUbLjryUcGz0410bd2SyK-qRUMG2eONeUXN1rMw38C2rXFbs-vkHIGIDmO3ExsEOr8K65nJ347U0hxDvGXabRFLxaJFg23qxK-wZKqa91osWhxc4xTNKNwripiFLG94i_0FaoXZ2g4msXeYw2b34_fZryvJQArReMjaJkoQeMEg9dHAURlOak20w_wX5MCVwnKM3pT4EXody_zisdqN06Lz9Tuw6dlShP4InumP5xGix91OWObqE2ZBQmQq8Q7LcZbjn5I8VnCbvRV86FHZ4B87CneE7XoYGjEVSyBjtrLM8d)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=25490b0c2fff4604b3ecdf77e7fd1485&_e=2L0SpWSWOXMSJrY5gmd9zj6HIJiNBWK9PMf4LPHob32JPOyqtC1obvBAF3N_USC6btP77vzNztG9EbpBB2oAaBaYpNJal9uBROj_rEp_x4QZrvHjelF4LODqJiYkg7HMWpzNUqfLa5tAs4iWdpeSUbLjryUcGz0410bd2SyK-qRUMG2eONeUXN1rMw38C2rXFbs-vkHIGIDmO3ExsEOr8K65nJ347U0hxDvGXabRFLxaJFg23qxK-wZKqa91osWhxc4xTNKNwripiFLG94i_0FPjhhbQnzi-fLGJ7sHg-nKajQ9_GOVWFkoI6r157PjY6eFDQdSORS7PeFzK5rIWP9QnMhUBV3M-kYLGGZKyuyUwKRZ9tA2KrJYZHuyS-OmVv9xt6oF8EvQbuKJ2M8Bz83s1i-ysbJcf3Czbjs_c2StNzL5xBPu7Yje4W-tg8Tmo)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=25490b0c2fff4604b3ecdf77e7fd1485&_e=2L0SpWSWOXMSJrY5gmd9zj6HIJiNBWK9PMf4LPHob32JPOyqtC1obvBAF3N_USC6btP77vzNztG9EbpBB2oAaBaYpNJal9uBROj_rEp_x4QZrvHjelF4LODqJiYkg7HMWpzNUqfLa5tAs4iWdpeSUbLjryUcGz0410bd2SyK-qRUMG2eONeUXN1rMw38C2rXFbs-vkHIGIDmO3ExsEOr8K65nJ347U0hxDvGXabRFLxaJFg23qxK-wZKqa91osWhxc4xTNKNwripiFLG94i_0PBvH4e_vMHE1E3wN4UHH2Gui5QJQyYF6ge-pQ0gQ_-Imy8CkgRupu-wDyBgyBPQlfn9d4V5rnTndkV4ezev_LU3S4bGinNQTx6K7iNC1ZpA4_k0_QkRlO6muoEdjqlTF892N0euDBxgC_9yCczHxfSjbK8up04M47Cu-HmaTm7r).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: =?utf-8?Q?Garrett=20Bess=2C=20VP=20at=20Heritage=20Action?=
subject: Elon Musk calls ESG “the devil” - here’s why
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
| | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=1505c819ef&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Across the country, the radical Left-wing Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) agenda is taking over. **** _Have you heard of ESG?_ **** This radical agenda represents...
* **Racial quotas in the workplace**
* **Cancel culture for “wrongthink”**
* **Corporate donations for abortion**
* **Pushing the trans issue onto children**
* **Critical Race Theory**
* **Corporate welfare**
* **Anti-oil, “green new deal” mandates**
* **A Social Credit Score**

... all in one MASSIVE package. It’s being pushed by “woke” corporations and Left-leaning financial institutions that fund them. **But don’t just take it from us. Tesla and new Twitter CEO Elon Musk went as far as calling ESG “the devil.”**
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ecd2ae504f&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Elon Musk has learned about the ESG agenda the hard way. _The S &P kicked Musk’s Tesla off of their ESG 500 index despite Musk’s company being an electric car company._ _This shows what ESG scores are really about—punishing political enemies for the Left!_ Even though Elon Musk has a “green” auto company, a major ESG “ratings” organization gave Tesla a low score. **Leftist institutions can subjectively fudge the numbers and use the ESG score to punish anyone they want!** This agenda claims to assist ‘sustainable investing’ for individuals – but this is further proof that it’s actually a social credit score designed to blackball conservatives, independent-minded Americans, and anyone who is dangerous to the Left’s socialist plan for America.. **At Heritage Action, we’re FIGHTING BACK against this radical movement with a nationwide campaign to END ESG.** It starts by fighting back against the financial institutions on Wall Street that are pushing this ESG agenda!
---
| | [**HELP US FIGHT BACK TODAY >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=eebbc0d695&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Our **ESG Hurts** campaign aims to raise awareness about the agenda and support the work of lawmakers who are fighting the ESG agenda. So far, we’ve had a BIG impact supporting state governments who keep their taxpayer dollars from funding ESG! This means:
* Protecting state pension and retirement accounts from being invested with financial firms who push for ESG.
* Making sure state contracts for banking and financial services are with institutions that are NOT pushing ESG.

**In 2022, multiple states have already sent a CLEAR message to the ESG powers-that-be and the Wall Street firms facilitating the agenda.**
* **MISSOURI divested $500M from woke investment firm BlackRock**
* **SOUTH CAROLINA divested $200M from BlackRock**
* **LOUISIANA also divested $800M from the Left-wing firm**
* **FLORIDA just divested $2 BILLION from BlackRock over ESG**

**These states are PROTECTING taxpayer dollars from funding a blatantly anti-American agenda!** Other states are fighting back—Oklahoma, Tennessee, and West Virginia have also taken prominent stands against ESG. Heritage Action’s “ESG Hurts” campaign has educated tens of thousands of Americans on this issue. And we’re backing the state legislation that is fighting to end ESG. **We need your help to keep this campaign moving in 2023–**** _and winning_****. Can we count on YOU to chip in and join our fight against the woke agenda?** Heritage Action is committed to supporting even more states in 2023 as they pass laws to protect America from the globalist ESG agenda. [_**Donate to Heritage Action today and keep ESG from Hurting America >>>**_](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=654954f812&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | [**DONATE $100**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d3bdffb9b8&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**DONATE $50**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=24f8e34f7a&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**DONATE $25**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=48d06ed52c&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | If Americans don’t learn the TRUTH about ESG – and lawmakers don’t put a stop to it – this agenda will take over our country. Heritage Action, will NEVER stop fighting until ESG is defeated, no matter what kind of opposition we face. **And we need grassroots Americans like YOU to stand with us against this radical agenda.**
---
| | [_**< < CHIP IN TODAY >>**_](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=dbd604d1bd&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | **When you contribute to the ESG Hurts campaign, you’re helping us...**
* Fund explainers about ESG and how it works
* Fund our activists fighting ESG on the front lines
* Fund our work implementing anti-ESG policies at the state level

We would really appreciate your support, Fellow Conservative. [**_Donate whatever you can today to support our fight against the WOKE ESG agenda in America! >>_**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=8778874a98&e=fdefed58de) Thank you,

Garrett Bess Vice President, Heritage Action
---
| | |
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: D.C. jail blocked cancer treatment for Jan. 6 peaceful protester
body:
Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission.
Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! | | | [ ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkMFugzAQRL8GbiBY25gcOLRFVI2aS6WkvUXGXsAqBuqYRPx9DW16qGRZ8szbWXmwSDOeUADO0lAVFETayFAXkACkkPCUJilATAXQpKEkrwnN-Y4FNEEjdB83FtF1evhEq_x7ieVowq7gkilaE1GjYoBM7YQUmCBNcmQ1Ch72RefcdAnIQwCVP2uOGs1NONnFFq9XH-RlKQaJNnIWhTM4uGg0AalmZ86XcbYSA1LebPSfCiBbEYNKz54v_dCPIoWZhG6HuybMOHuclMDuxDg43KRB9lFVvcvqsM_f0NvnodfKG__ETiv_jfJ1SF9ats9CW6jppvteXzLua2q3mtZW_O5eN0sR8McAYBsD2AqA2ZGTOB4Pdonw6yN6ZidoVxOe_O2WCf_I35B4a39VefkNG5COcA)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkM1ugzAQhJ8GbiB7bTA5cGiLUrVqpRyaqLfI-AesYpM6JhFvX0ObHiJZlvzN7Kw8qsYlQxSAFTiVNQWOtUhNDQgAA2KYIgyQUw4UaUqqltCKbYqEImW5GXLtlQq9cV_Ky_ieczHatK9bDmWF5AZjqBQDQYqy1a2udFyEkGbpUPchnM4JeUhgG8-SI0d75UH0uVeXSwyKWHAnlM-CVzxY5UI22oRsp2CP53HyQiWkufrs3pVAuViskmaK_iYO_RLB7Ymbzt0Yt-MU7aSB4uYYXVArcmLIdrtNmL3zH_soH91gZBTuYG9k_Ebz5vBLV7yWqa_l6WqGwZxLFmvq1pqWVuLuwei5TthjArCOAawFwBTIge_3737O1Pdn9lwcoFtEeIp3mE_q3_kXkq_tL5Q1Pyf0joU) Hi Friend,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkFFPgzAUhX9NeYPQ21LGAw9OnNGob1t8M125QCMt2JVN_r0FnQ9Lmib9zrnnpgdLKvKUA-QZjeqSg6SNinQJKQCFNKc8pQAJl8DThrPNkfFNXmSEp2ik7pPGIfpO2090dXjPiRpM1JVZWjTFMUQ0vGCCFlJtMC8KIVDVTAkR9WXn_Xgi7I7ALpwlpx7MRXrVJQ7P5xAUsJJWoYu9Q-kNWh8PhrDd5M3HaZicQsKqi4tvXQTEYjFY6yn4qzD0S5Q0o9StvTJphinYWQXZ1TFYjyuyqo-devjGt631Lsgfttd1EG5gp-vwjerF0qc2exaRK-vxovten0QeamrXmpZWwu5eN3NJ8i0BWMcA1gJg8uwg9_tXN8f49R4_ZgdoFxHuw-3nEf-dfyHJ2v5C8-oHKUOOpg)

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building. But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email. Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals. Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy. Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently. And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.” So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them! If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too. That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court. I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking. Thank you! Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Help teach more kids true American history
body:
You’ve probably noticed that children today aren’t getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were g
|
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zafltengho7jegsjtge046cv4do647d1t895ph88_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5j69or0c3h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

You've probably noticed that children today aren't getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were growing up.

We used to be taught to love our nation, cherish our history, and respect our fellow Americans. But all of that has changed.

In today's classroom, children are taught that America is fundamentally racist, that our history is one of oppression, and that we should focus on our differences instead of what unites us.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvqrmsdn8jj24uae6gf0db3pe66jkfjsfc9736rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5j69or0c3h2bs)
__To make matters worse: the right of parents to choose how and where their kids receive their education remains out of reach for most American families.

And this is exactly why we created our Little Patriots program--to give parents, grandparents, teachers, and caregivers a free online resource they can use to teach children unbiased civics lessons, history, and American values, anywhere and anytime--[completely free of charge.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0t845lrc881j0fd23r3hbk3mejhjjqb27t6dtc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5j69or0c3h2bs)

**And now we plan to do even more.**

To meet the growing demand for educational resources that teach children to love their country and its history, we're taking Little Patriots on the road to bring these educational resources to schools, churches, and community organizations!

But to help us fund this coast-to-coast effort, I need your help today.

We depend on the generous support of patriots like you to help us fund this program and share it with children and families across our great nation.

If you believe that American children deserve to receive the best education possible, [can I personally ask you to help me accomplish my goal of getting this first-of-its-kind curriculum to anyone who needs it?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9cae9aeq1reg4iqmk0d6i0fa4f48kn67cfo9kdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5j69or0c3h2bs)

If you'd like to help me get Little Patriots to more American children, please click the link below to make your generous tax-deductible gift today:

[**https://secure.americancornerstone.org/little-patriots-tour-donate**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zglv6ocvocpqcvk7548lg1huj093l63bjf4gii1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5j69or0c3h2bs)

Thank you so much for supporting these efforts--[together we can help kids across the U.S. get the education they deserve.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqd3eadkfooi1h6tdaklqiqni6moobbcce6km14o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5j69or0c3h2bs)

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---

---
---

subject: Our Rural Physician Workforce Production Act

body:

#
---
Team, Kyrsten is working hard to ensure Arizonans have access to quality, affordable health care. **One way we’re addressing care for Arizonans, especially in rural communities, is through the _Rural Physician Workforce Production Act_ , bipartisan legislation Kyrsten cosponsored to help train and keep doctors in rural and tribal communities and underserved areas across the state.** This bill will support medical training programs and help grow the number of primary physicians and specialists in rural areas, giving families more choices for care closer to where they live. [**Families in every corner of our state deserve access to quality health care close to home, so we’re taking action to address doctor shortages through our _Rural Physician Workforce Production Act_. Will you join us and support our bill to improve access to care across Arizona? ---
Peter, Today marks the 81st anniversary of the attack on Pearl Harbor. On this infamous day in 1941, 2,403 Americans were murdered, and our nation was brought into a brutal world war. Please join me in prayer and reflection as we take a moment to remember the courageous men and women who died for our country, those who survived, and their families and friends who suffered the loss of loved ones on that terrible day. Though we mourned as a nation for the lives lost on that tragic day, we also remember how we rallied together and rebuilt as a nation. The American Dream lived on and we were not broken. Let us continue to remember this day, the lives lost, and the reasons it's important to fight and stand for our values and liberties.

Sincerely,
---
Katie
---
---
| |
---

body:

| | | | | | | Peter, Big Tech has to be investigated.

This is Attorney General Jeff Landry, and I want to tell you why I'm running for Governor.

According to a source in the FBI, social media was warned by the FBI to look out for "Russian propaganda", ahead of the 2020 election.
_**The FBI even held weekly meetings with Big Tech companies to discuss how to censor "Russian disinformation!"**_

ACCOUNTABLE")

This is blatant sabotage on our elections and freedoms, Peter. Big Tech cannot be allowed to get away with facilitating this. The American public deserves better.

At the very least, the public deserves safety and protection, which is the **PRIMARY ROLE** of government!
**_[It is time to put an end to this corruption and take a stand for freedom.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62042273:JTGKioGUN:m:1:3331421248:89073C6C6420E3A29C79E4AF7F50F3A9:r "It is time to put

Peter, will you join me?

name: Add Your Name (Left Action)
subject: It's time for Trump to pay for his crimes. Sign the petition >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
## [Tell the Jan 6th Committee: "Recommend Criminal Charges against Trump"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4b5dd081-f205-4553-b0ad-1ee1c909ee6f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te05b1057-90a2-48cc-a0fa-028adb36c550/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The House committee investigating the attack on the Capitol is nearing the end of its work, and one of the final steps is deciding whether to formally recommend that the Department of Justice bring criminal charges against those involved.

It appears that the Committee is likely to recommend some (see CNN), but has not yet decided whether that will include Trump. With time running out, the Committee has only a matter of days to make that decision.

[**Add your name, and tell the Committee to recommend criminal charges against Trump.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T927439c0-dbc0-4b7d-b266-0acf9d3f45b8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

There is overwhelming evidence that Trump broke laws when he stoked the fires of insurrection. And while charging a former (and potentially future) president would be unprecedented, so were Trump's actions, and so is the threat he continues to pose. **For the good of our nation, he needs to pay for his crimes.**

The DOJ will ultimately make the decision, but a formal recommendation from Congress carries a lot of weight, and will no doubt have an impact. Time is short, so tell them to take this step, and make sure to spread the word so that they hear from as many people as possible, as quickly as possible.

[**Add your name, and tell the Committee to recommend criminal charges against Trump.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06e91067-eb33-4abb-a8d0-b61c3af4fcb1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | The House committee investigating the attack on the Capitol is nearing the end of its work, and one of the final steps is deciding whether to formally recommend that the Department of Justice bring criminal charges against those involved. It appears that the Committee is likely to recommend some (see CNN), but has not yet decided whether that will include Trump. With time running out, the Committee has only a matter of days to make that decision. There is overwhelming evidence that Trump broke laws when he stoked the fires of insurrection. And while charging a former (and potentially future) president would be unprecedented, so were Trump's actions, and so is the threat he continues to pose. For the good of our nation, he needs to pay for his crimes. The DOJ will ultimately make the decision, but a formal recommendation from Congress carries a lot of weight, and will no doubt have an impact. Time is short, so tell them to take this step, and make sure to spread the word so that they hear from as many people as possible, as quickly as possible. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on and * Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

name: Michael Peroutka
subject: Election Uncertainties
body:
|
---
ELECTION UNCERTAINTIES (December, 2022)
According to the Maryland Board of Elections, I received almost seven hundred thousand votes as the nominee of the Republican Party for the Office of Attorney General of Maryland. My democrat opponent was reported to have received almost twice that amount.
This is, of course, disappointing to those who love liberty and care about the restoration of constitutional and moral government.
But, beyond disappointment there are troubling uncertainties about the election process and profound skepticism about the results.
Over the last two decades, election integrity in Maryland has been destroyed by the introduction of early voting, hackable voting machines, ballot harvesting, drop boxes, and the indiscriminate distribution of millions of mail-in ballots which invite and reward fraud.
Moreover, those who dare to raise legitimate questions about the process are denounced by government officials and by their complicit media comrades as malcontents and terrorists. My purpose in running was to use the investigative authority of the Attorney General to restore election confidence by ensuring election integrity. Now, I fear that the office will be used to squash legitimate questions and to promote, rather than to punish, lawbreaking.
The viability of our Republic depends upon sweeping reform of our election methods and procedures including single day voting by paper ballots that are hand counted by real citizens.
This is Michael Anthony Peroutka, bringing you The American View.

body:
We got the WIN in Georgia last night and we couldn’t be more proud of the role we played in Senator Warnock’s re-election.
#
Derek -
We got the WIN in Georgia last night and we couldn’t be more proud of the role we played in Senator Warnock’s re-election.
Overall this cycle, we spent $8 million in Georgia, including $1.3 during the runoff, and our ads were some of the best testing in the entire state.
More than that, we ran a massive organizing push connecting our Veterans and Military Family members with nearly 100,000 of their peers in Georgia during the runoff, and reached even more during the general election.
No one person or group can win a large and expensive election like the Georgia Senate race alone, but we certainly played our part.
That’s in large part because of you. The majority of the donations we receive come in response to emails like this one, and that drives our programs in key races.
Thank you.
**So we do NOT have a fundraising ask for you today, but we do have a VERY IMPORTANT QUESTION:**

It’s great information to know and we’re always looking to update our numbers — they give us a lot of power and credibility. body:
All hope is not lost.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62042432:6vXSioGwN:m:1:3331703221:BCF44E2016AD1EC090F1FF8212A0CC67:r)
---
Peter,
---
Conservatives still have a great path to taking back the Senate majority from Joe Biden.
---
**All we need to do is FLIP two Democrat-held seats on this map.**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62042432:6vXSioGwN:m:1:3331703221:BCF44E2016AD1EC090F1FF8212A0CC67:r)
---
If I win my race against Joe Manchin in West Virginia and Republicans win just ONE of the Democrat-held Senate seats in Montana, Ohio, Arizona, Nevada, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Michigan, or elsewhere, we'll retake the majority.
---
_In other words, all we need to do is win the Senate races in Republican states!_
---
[CONTRIBUTE TO FLP WEST VIRGINIA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62042432:6vXSioGwN:m:1:3331703221:BCF44E2016AD1EC090F1FF8212A0CC67:r)
---

But make no mistake: this won't be easy....
---
Manchin is going to spend every penny of his $10 MILLION war chest to try and stop us, and national Democrats are already rushing to his defense.
---

name: Garrett Bess, VP @ Heritage Action
subject: Elon Musk calls ESG “the devil” - here’s why
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Radical Left-wing Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) agenda is taking over.
| | | [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxVkU9vhCAQxT8N3jQw_kEPHmzNbi89NOlujxuUQUlFDWK6fvuiu2nShJDM7z2G4YElyzhNYlrwIpBlAoKpNtAlUAAGlLMsZkke8QbzTDUF5bFSacJIQtEIPUTKIrpej99opa-3qJ1M0JcyYWkuqSraFrK8UZQXtMm5SCFuEfMmGMreuXkhcUXg5JecRuEw6tFqJzoUrdPTuDfz2qMI0yxnnOehcpLEp9WZWyvMLHQ3krh-igSyQ5hGh6PzfDc_mEGpV-PRbKdlfsJlWm2L_3wO7e7CwV-JS-epMNN6NIPUV7dx0H6AuumTr7fqZM7nA_Za-tfUvLp_Xj_uPLClnH_0MOgl4z6t7khrD8fPPGi1lYS_EIDjGMCRA6wuvorL5d1uYXVtwnN6hW4X4dXvbpvxz_lsEh2fsFNe_wK4KY6R)
---
| | Friend, Across the country, the radical Left-wing Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) agenda is taking over. ** ** _Have you heard of ESG?_ ** ** This radical agenda represents...
* **Racial quotas in the workplace**
* **Cancel culture for “wrongthink”**
* **Corporate donations for abortion**
* **Pushing the trans issue onto children**
* **Critical Race Theory**
* **Corporate welfare**
* **Anti-oil, “green new deal” mandates**
* **A Social Credit Score**

... all in one MASSIVE package. It’s being pushed by “woke” corporations and Left-leaning financial institutions that fund them. **But don’t just take it from us. Tesla and new Twitter CEO Elon Musk went as far as calling ESG “the devil.”**
---
| | [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxVkc1ugzAQhJ8GbiB7MRgOHNKiNJceIjUccomMvQar_AmMEvr0NSSqVMmytN-M1-sx5jThhEUk45mvcgaCaumbHAgABcJpElGWhrzCNNFVRnikdcyoxwh2wrShnhBtY_pvnJSr11AOnd_kRCAITokCkJXMNAPUKcmQMo1SSOK3eWPtOHvRwYOjW2rohcWwwclYUaOQ1gz91sxpzyKIk5RyngbaKi86Lra7SdGNwtS9FxUv0YNkF4beYm8d38xP1qEyS-fQOA3z-ILzsEwS__ksTpsLW3clzrWjohuWvRnErrr1rXEDFNfr6Xz_keyU7rAxyr2m4IfHV3l-cH_K1Xg3bWvmhLu06j2tLRw3c2v0mnv8zQPYjwHsOcBio1JcLp_TGhzKKviIS6g3Ed7dbtcR_5yvJuH-CRvlxS92ZI87)
---
| | Elon Musk has learned about the ESG agenda the hard way. _The S &P kicked Musk’s Tesla off of their ESG 500 index despite Musk’s company being an electric car company._ _This shows what ESG scores are really about—punishing political enemies for the Left! _ Even though Elon Musk has a “green” auto company, a major ESG “ratings” organization gave Tesla a low score. **Leftist institutions can subjectively fudge the numbers and use the ESG score to punish anyone they want!** This agenda claims to assist ‘sustainable investing’ for individuals – but this is further proof that it’s actually a social credit score designed to blackball conservatives, independent-minded Americans, and anyone who is dangerous to the Left’s socialist plan for America.. **At Heritage Action, we’re FIGHTING BACK against this radical movement with a nationwide campaign to END ESG.** It starts by fighting back against the financial institutions on Wall Street that are pushing this ESG agenda!
---
| | [**HELP US FIGHT BACK TODAY >>**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxVkc1qhDAUhZ8m7kbyZ6ILF7Yys2ppoSN0VTLmqqEaJcZ27NM3OkOhEAL3Oyc3NyeQEyExZziTWaRzThVp6sjkFFNKKJZEMMLTWF4gFc0lw5I1TcIJ4hgGZfq4cQC-M_YTnA71GtfjEHW5SDmWAEkmpWYkI5gwwcPxVJKUN0JHfd55P82IFYgew9KjVR7iDpzxqgVVezParVnQbsUhESmRMj00XiN2XPzwUathUqa1iJV3EVGxC6P1YH3gm_nGBtBmGQKa3DhPdziPi6vhn8-D21zQhythbgNVw7jszWgSqg_bmzBAWbjn9_PP6cu-7LAzOrymlMX1rXq9ysjlevo2fW9mIUNa7Z7WFk6YuTfNmiP5gCjdj1G650AXzyp1Pj-59VBUl8MpqWi7ifQx7H6d4M95bxLvn7BRWf4CPwSN0g)
---
| | Our **ESG Hurts** campaign aims to raise awareness about the agenda and support the work of lawmakers who are fighting the ESG agenda. So far, we’ve had a BIG impact supporting state governments who keep their taxpayer dollars from funding ESG! This means:
* Protecting state pension and retirement accounts from being invested with financial firms who push for ESG.
* Making sure state contracts for banking and financial services are with institutions that are NOT pushing ESG.

**In 2022, multiple states have already sent a CLEAR message to the ESG powers-that-be and the Wall Street firms facilitating the agenda.**
* **MISSOURI divested $500M from woke investment firm BlackRock**
* **SOUTH CAROLINA divested $200M from BlackRock**
* **LOUISIANA also divested $800M from the Left-wing firm**
* **FLORIDA just divested $2 BILLION from BlackRock over ESG**

**These states are PROTECTING taxpayer dollars from funding a blatantly anti-American agenda!** Other states are fighting back—Oklahoma, Tennessee, and West Virginia have also taken prominent stands against ESG. Heritage Action’s “ESG Hurts” campaign has educated tens of thousands of Americans on this issue. And we’re backing the state legislation that is fighting to end ESG. **We need your help to keep this campaign moving in 2023–**** _and winning_****. Can we count on YOU to chip in and join our fight against the woke agenda?** Heritage Action is committed to supporting even more states in 2023 as they pass laws to protect America from the globalist ESG agenda. _**[Donate to Heritage Action today and keep ESG from Hurting America >>>](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxVkU9vhCAQxT8N3tbIgKAHD7Zme9qmTbpeG5RByfoviun67YvupkkTQjK_9xiGB2ZUyIizKJVpoDMOipo6sBlEABQiSQWjPAllhYkwVRpJZkzMKeER9sp2oZkRXWuHG87a11tYj33QZioWMWe0joRgEjhNY62MRgBEbqo6CbqsdW5aCMsJnP3S46Achi3O1qkGVe3sOOzNvPYoTrFIqJTJyThN2Hl1_Xet-knZZiCseIoExCGMg8PBeb6bH6xHbdfeo2kel-kJl3Gda_znczjvLuz8lbg0nqp-XI9mEPvqe-isH6CoLq2rl_db_nHA1mr_mkLm96_y8y6DOdPTj-06uwjp02qOtPZw_MydNVtG5AsBOI4BHDnA6liprtfLvJ3ysjq9xSU0uwivfnfbhH_OZ5Pw-ISdyuIXq8OO4w)**_

name: PA Democrats
subject: Warnock’s Win Cements Fetterman as 51st Vote!
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/PDP%20Primary%20Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
Huge congratulations to Senator Raphael Warnock and Georgia Democrats on their big victory yesterday!
This win cements Senator-Elect John Fetterman as the 51st Democratic vote in the newly expanded majority . The win marks the first time since 1962 that the party controlling the White House has picked up a Senate seat in the first midterm.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=email120722&recurring=1&express_lane=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=email120722&recurring=1&express_lane=true]
And Fetterman’s win was just one part of the historic election night [https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2022-election/was-wave-election-pennsylvania-democrats-rcna57558?emci=f1f2ec07-5576-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=f1673e55-5576-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=13441034] that Pennsylvania Democrats had! Despite predictions of a red wave, Pennsylvania Democrats instead swept up victory after victory from the Governor’s office to the State House.
From day one, Democrats have been working hard to protect and expand the Senate majority. Last night, Democrats delivered.
Now comes the exciting part – fighting for voting rights, reproductive rights, healthcare, and making our economy stronger for Pennsylvania workers and families! Will you continue to stand with Pennsylvania Democrats by chipping in $10 or $15 now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=email120722&recurring=1�express_lane=true]

name: Senator Patty Murray
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Warnock wins in Georgia!
#
Peter,
I’m sure you’ve seen the news by now — Georgia voters have reelected Senator Warnock. That means Democrats have just secured our 51st vote and expanded our majority in the Senate.
**This was possible because of all of YOU. Your support, volunteering, and donations are what made the difference in this election and helped make sure Democrats kept the Senate.**
**[With 51 Democratic Senators, we will get right to work on issues like protecting the right to abortion, fighting the climate crisis, and bringing down costs for working families. Will you add your name now to show support for our work ahead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55685275/382458509/-189737903?refcode=pm_em_221207_1&ms=pm_em_221207_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjhkYTc4Zi03Njc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4X8f4ZtOqlEsVCbZFSHIeJOwnFm_eQtU5R3_ctFMuk4=&emci=a6738c32-6876-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=d68da78f-7676-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=13116610)**
We’ve seen how tough it is to get legislation across the finish line with a slim majority — but with 51 Democrats we’re in a better position to build on the progress we’ve made and stop the GOP’s extreme agenda.
**[There’s a lot of work ahead — if we can count on you to stand with Democrats as we fight to deliver for the people of Washington state and across the country, add your name now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55685276/382458510/-189737903?refcode=pm_em_221207_1&ms=pm_em_221207_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjhkYTc4Zi03Njc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4X8f4ZtOqlEsVCbZFSHIeJOwnFm_eQtU5R3_ctFMuk4=&emci=a6738c32-6876-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=d68da78f-7676-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=13116610)**
Thank you,
Patty Murray

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55685277/382458511/1499656450?refcode=pm_em_221207_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjhkYTc4Zi03Njc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4X8f4ZtOqlEsVCbZFSHIeJOwnFm_eQtU5R3_ctFMuk4=)****

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

Your support, volunteering, and donations are what made the difference in this election and helped make sure Democrats kept the Senate. We’ve seen how tough it is to get legislation across the finish line with a slim majority — but with 51 Democrats we’re in a better position to build on the progress we’ve made and stop the GOP’s extreme agenda. Thank you, Patty Murray **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Dave Kubal
subject: Pray for Amy Coney Barrett
body:
On this second Sunday of Advent, I wanted to invite you to give it to God. Everything. Every anxiety, every fear, every frustra
| | |
---
Dear Prayer Warrior, [**Will you sign a prayer card today for Amy Coney Barrett?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6qn31nt5nmj652q0551gbf9ta7k1ltsr8t2g97o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5gm6o30cth2bs) Even though _Dobbs_ has long been decided by the Supreme Court, pro-abortion activists aren’t cooling down their anger at the brave Justices who overturned 50 years of legally mandated abortion.Within the past few weeks, protesters surrounded Justice Barrett’s house, banging on drums and shouting at the Justice while screaming that she is “illegitimate and unfit.”This is clear harassment of a Supreme Court Justice, which is illegal – but the pro-abortion Biden administration is turning a blind eye. [**Join me in blanketing Justice Barrett and her family with prayer as they face persecution for her courage.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zb7hr1kse2p24r3d0369jtqv4psj8gpimvjkcme8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5gm6o30cth2bs) Justice Amy Coney Barrett’s home is not the only place she’s being targeted for protecting the unborn. Hundreds of “literary figures” have just penned a letter to Penguin Random House, calling for them to cancel their book deal with Barrett.What is the reason they’re citing?The fact that she voted to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.Friend, the radical Left truly wants to ruin the lives of anyone who promotes biblical values and fights for the right to life.They want to make our lives miserable so we lose the courage to fight – and Justice Amy Coney Barrett is their latest target. [**Will you sign a prayer card for Justice Amy Coney Barrett to let her know you’re standing with her despite abortion activists’ efforts to harass and censor her?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhuirat37gvbkgsen35rbngn5ri44adoh6e1qc70_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5gm6o30cth2bs) Amy Coney Barrett has never been one to back down when faced with attacks, and we've seen these personal and spiritual attacks appear since she was first introduced as the nominee to replace Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg.And attacks from the forces of spiritual opposition, you and I know, will be waged against anyone who stands up for the Word of God.As believers, we must join together and ask our Heavenly Father to:
---
| |
* Keep Justice Barrett and her family healthy and safe from the enemy's snares (Psalm 141: 9-10).
* Ensure Justice Barrett would show no fear toward the evil that assails her (Isaiah 8:12), but rather overcome it with a zeal and passion for His laws which bring life and liberty to all (Proverbs 10:29-32).
* Sustain Justice Barrett so that she will continue to love His word and seek His wisdom diligently (Proverbs 8:17), remaining open and teachable to Godly counsel and heaven's wisdom (Proverbs 1:7).
* Grant Justice Barrett and her family increased grace and blessing as she heeds His voice and obeys His word (Proverbs 21:1).

---
| | Today, I need your help as a prayer leader in your community to combat any and all attacks on Amy Coney Barrett and her young family with around the clock prayer protection. [**Join the prayer team for the Justice by signing your prayer card for Amy Coney Barrett, and uplift herwith a personal note to remind her she's not fighting alone.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z240tor578a6fc547pe963lt7peglae51g2nkj10_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5gm6o30cth2bs) Our mission at Intercessors for America is to inform, connect, and mobilize intercessors to pray for our nation and our leaders. We've delivered prayer cards from Christians like you to conservative leaders such as President Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis, and Justice Clarence Thomas.As his enemies ramp up their attacks --- we must also ramp up our efforts to fight back in the most powerful way possible --- **_with prayer._** [**So don't delay in signing your PRAYER CARD for Justce Amy Coney Barrett.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc2lct61r0vdpj0oaa3u23r10q3sng5dh79njbo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5gm6o30cth2bs) Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl66tveposs6eau0np3vdrrnjkl4rnoecgcv0tno_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5gm6o30cth2bs)
---
Dave KubalPresident & CEO Intercessors for America (IFA)
---
[**SIGN THE PRAYER CARD**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztv9m29p50fndemtv963amdeodvhi7n82fupjcrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5gm6o30cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z85pfsmdufhov7vrb2hevukj88avugdn9ho7ock8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5gm6o30cth2bs)
---
Intercessors for America (IFA) is a 501(c)(3) ministry organization and was founded in 1973 when God impressed upon the hearts of a group of godly, respected men the necessity of prayer and fasting.

subject: re: public evidence of January 6th hearings
body:
The House select committee is set to release evidence to the public. | | |

| | Now that Democrats have lost the House, Kevin McCarthy and Jim Jordan are threatening to investigate the January 6th Select Committee – potentially cherry-picking evidence to sabotage Democrats. name: =?utf-8?Q?Lavern=20Spicer?=
subject: Curley's Christmas Drive
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=64c697c643&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hello PeterTimes are hard out here as we get ready for the Christmas season. In Florida, just like every other state in this nation, families are struggling because of extremely high gas prices, runaway inflation and the rising cost of living.I’ve been operating my food bank for 20 years and I’ve got to say, it’s never been as hard as it is right now for people. The lines get longer every week. Now at Christmas time, it breaks my heart more than usual.
I hear stories of fixed-income families not even able to buy small gifts for their kids because they’re struggling to get by. The government talks about how great things are going in our economy but we all know that is a lie. I see it every single day.I’m reaching out to you because I know that you’ve got a big heart just like me and you want to help families this Christmas season. Curley’s House, my food bank, has been helping this community for 20+ years. This Christmas season, though, we’re going to need to raise some extra funds to help these people out some more.Most years we buy toys and things for the kids so they can have something under their tree. We might have to cut that part this year because things are too high, but we’re going to try and not do that. I need to raise about $2,400 extra so we can go out and get some toys for these kids to have something under their tree.**That’s my goal: $2,400.**
| [DONATE $25.00 TODAY](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c792dc0f9e&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $50.00 TODAY](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=255354652b&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $150.00 TODAY](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d45a8f2357&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $500.00 TODAY](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c4562c5725&e=fdefed58de)
---
Whatever you can give will be greatly appreciated, **And just so you know, whatever that you donate to Curley’s House is tax-deductible as we are a 501c3 organization. So please, give generously as possible.**
| [PLEASE DONATE TO CURLEY’S HOUSE TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=85b3ef6908&e=fdefed58de)
---
With love and gratitude,Lavern SpicerFounder of Curley’s House

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: IL GOP Point Fingers at Illinois Review, Despite Supporting Democrat Richard Irvin
body:
>From pushing a Democrat in the gubernatorial primary race to donating to Biden to representing the Pritzker family, it's no wonder IL GOP doesn't win.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/e56c1a7e796e/alert-il-gop-point-fingers-at-illinois-review-despite-supporting-democrat-richard-irvin?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IL GOP Point Fingers at Illinois Review, Grassroots, Despite Supporting Democrat Richard Irvin (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-points-fingers-at-illinois-review-grassroots-despite-supporting-democrat-richard-irvin.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Embattled IL GOP chair Don Tracy is using the few allies he has left to fight back against the tsunami wave of support from the grassroots, who are calling for his resignation following embarrassing losses during the midterm election and new revelations that his family-owned business, Dot Foods (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-chair-don-tracys-family-owned-business-donated-to-biden-never-trumpers.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , where he is an owner, donated to Joe Biden in 2020 (https://www.opensecrets.org/orgs/dot-foods/summary?topnumcycle=2022&contribcycle=2022&lobcycle=2022&outspendcycle=2022&id=D000044109&toprecipcycle=2020&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) during the height of the pandemic and lockdowns.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-points-fingers-at-illinois-review-grassroots-despite-supporting-democrat-richard-irvin.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
GOP House Minority leader Jim Durkin and Democrat House Speaker Mike Madigan share a moment together. (Justin L. Fowler/The State Journal-Register via AP-file)

============================================================

As the ** Chicago Tribune Editorial Board (https://www.chicagotribune.com/opinion/editorials/ct-editorial-illinois-republican-drubbing-midterm-elections-trump-20221111-zo4qahohojcydftvpwrhkmlkme-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
pointed out in a Nov. 11 editorial,
“Republicans lost every state constitutional office – governor, attorney general, secretary of state, comptroller and treasurer – and 14 of 17 congressional seats. In the General Assembly, not only did the GOP fail to gain any ground on Democrats’ supermajority, Democrats notched a record number of seats in the Illinois House. And in the Illinois Supreme Court, where Republicans had an opportunity to gain two seats...they came up short. Democrats now have a comfortable 5-2 edge in the state’s high court.”

In a ** Facebook post (https://www.facebook.com/RNCPORTER?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
on Tuesday evening, GOP national committeemen and co-chairman of the ** Richard Irvin for governor campaign (https://www.politico.com/f/?id=0000017e-6d5c-dbc8-a1ff-7d7dbf990000&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, Richard Porter defended Tracy, writing, “Don Tracy in particular made strides in building our party since he took over in 2021.”

Porter also highlighted Tracy’s ability to fundraise – a point that the establishment loves making.

However, as reported in a previous article titled, “** IL GOP Establishment to Grassroots: Only Rich, Donor Voices Matter (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-to-grassroots-only-rich-donor-voices-matter.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, the GOP measures the quality of a Republican only by how much money they donate or raise. Leslie Munger, a GOP establishment and ** two-time failed candidate (https://ballotpedia.org/Leslie_Munger?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
who’s never won an election makes this point clear in a Facebook comment, writing:
“I’m struck by the number of people who have never run for office, never run a campaign, never canvassed thousands of doors, never raised millions of dollars to support Republican political efforts, and/or never contributed substantial funds to the ILGOP or a specific candidate are now the loudest voices complaining about the results of this election.”

Munger then finished her sentence with,
“I have done all of the above.”

But Porter wasn’t finished praising Tracy, saying,
“No one wants to win more than me. And if I thought for a second that firing Don would open the door to victory, I would fire his a** in a NY minute. Instead, every time I speak to or see Don, I say 'thanks for what you’re doing!'”

But Porter saved his best for last, writing that “the biggest problem confronting our party now is divisiveness.”

Porter goes on to say, “We have all sorts of otherwise good people that spend more energy attacking other Republicans than they do trying to persuade Independents and Democrats to vote for us.”

But Porter forgets the divisiveness of the Richard Irvin for governor campaign, where he served as an advisor and co-chairman.

Not only was Irvin a Democrat running for governor as a Republican, but he also supported JB Pritzker, and spent years ** praising him (https://twitter.com/demgovs/status/1483091889607909379?s=61&t=PRMWA5ZjyteefflEsOtYwQ&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

Irvin also spent a great deal of time attacking fellow Republicans, including Republican grassroots candidate Darren Bailey.

“Darren Bailey’s candidacy is so weak, he needs JB Pritzker to do his dirty work,” said the ** Irvin campaign (https://abc7chicago.com/governor-of-illinois-candidates-election-pritzker/11846577/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

“A vote for Darren Bailey is a vote for JB Pritzker,” said Irvin in
** another interview (https://herald-review.com/down-in-polls-irvin-says-a-vote-for-bailey-is-vote-to-re-elect-gov/article_28ffd09e-e90e-11ec-8f5f-b7b32fcbdea4.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

Irvin even attacked GOP candidate for governor Jesse Sullivan’s civilian service in Afghanistan, leading veterans to respond by calling Irvin’s comments a “** disgrace (https://prairiestatewire.com/stories/625186668-as-veterans-we-are-repulsed-by-irvin-ads-attacking-sullivan?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.”

In the end, Porter and his candidate Irvin would lose the primary badly — blowing ** $50 million (https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2022-election/illinois-gops-50-million-primary-debacle-rcna35534?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
and losing to Bailey by ** 42 points (https://www.cnn.com/election/2022/results/illinois/republican-primaries/governor?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

But the grassroots, conservative base of the Republican party shouldn’t be surprised with the establishment supporting the Irvin campaign, and why they’re fighting back so hard to protect Tracy. After all, consider the following:

Richard Irvin pulled ** Democratic ballots (https://twitter.com/markmaxwelltv/status/1471589397552320517?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
in 2014, 2016 and in 2020 — and spoke at a Black Lives Matter rally in 2020, yelling, “I can’t breathe!”

Don Tracy ran as a
** Democrat in 2002 (https://www.elections.il.gov/ElectionOperations/CandidateDetailEO.aspx?CandidateID=R%2fbzwrvri7J3D7vdz10qXA%3d%3d&ElectionID=pq0YmF3ui0Y%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, and his family-owned business, where he is an owner, donated to ** Joe Biden in 2020 (https://www.opensecrets.org/orgs/dot-foods/summary?topnumcycle=2022&contribcycle=2022&lobcycle=2022&outspendcycle=2022&id=D000044109&toprecipcycle=2020&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
during the height of the pandemic.

And Richard Porter is a senior partner at
** Kirkland & Ellis (https://www.kirkland.com/lawyers/p/porter-richard-w-pc?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, a large Chicago law firm that represents Pritzker family interests, including ** Pritzker Private Capital (https://www.kirkland.com/news/press-release/2021/09/kirkland-advises-pritzker-on-nai-group?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

No wonder Republicans can’t win in Illinois – there are too many connections to Democrats.

The next State Central Committee meeting is December 10th at 10:00 am at the Bolingbrook Golf Club in Bolingbrook where grassroots activists are encouraged to attend and speak.

** (https://youtu.be/QOyFraLPPLo?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Richard Irvin speaking at a BLM rally in Summer 2020. Eighteen months later, Irvin would announce his candidacy as a Republican gubernatorial candidate, with Richard Porter serving as his campaign advisor and co-chair.

To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cc4a714317-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_07_04_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cc4a714317-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

clean_body: From pushing a Democrat in the gubernatorial primary race to donating to Biden to representing the Pritzker family, it's no wonder IL GOP doesn't win.

subject: Our successes in Georgia, by the numbers
