body:
We’ve made strong investments in voter mobilization and education efforts, and it’s time to show everyone that our work is paying off. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55685661/382460464/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221207_f_win_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjI5NzE3YS03YTc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KGO-P_mcvfF5qLtCIMIn5dkjSPZ-Buq4a5z3pD-PxDM=&emci=5029717a-7a76-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=5229717a-7a76-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1037277)

| | The results are in — **voting rights champion Senator Raphael Warnock will serve six more years in the U.S. Senate!** Today, we want to take a moment to celebrate just how much we achieved in this Runoff Election:
* We made 1,154,556 calls to voters in the Peach State,
* We sent 4,008,129 texts to voters, and
* We completed 2,039 volunteer shifts.

These numbers show the undeniable strength of our pro-voter movement, and this victory shows the tangible impact we can make when voters are empowered to make their voices heard. Thank you for being in this fight — these accomplishments wouldn’t have been possible without supporters like you. **But our work to protect and expand the freedom to vote — particularly for young voters and people of color who’ve been historically shut out of the process — is far from over.** [_**Together, we can continue ensuring that every eligible voter has equal access to the ballot box — before, during, and after important elections like this one. A donation today will help fuel our critical work.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55685662/382460465/229506340?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221207_f_win_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjI5NzE3YS03YTc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KGO-P_mcvfF5qLtCIMIn5dkjSPZ-Buq4a5z3pD-PxDM=) We love to highlight the numbers, but our true measure of success is in our people — the people who put in the tremendous work to make voting rights a key issue in this year’s elections, the people who trained hundreds of volunteers on the ground to combat voter suppression and intimidation, and the people who had the courage to speak up even when anti-democratic politicians tried to silence them. With a team like this one, we’re confident about the impact we can continue to make in Georgia — with Raphael Warnock leading the charge to expand the freedom to vote in the U.S. Senate. We’ll keep working towards a democracy that works for everyone. And we’ll keep up our efforts to combat voter suppression and break down barriers to civic participation. [_**Chip in today to renew your support for Fair Fight’s work beyond Election Day — we can’t sustain our critical voter protection and education work without people like you.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55685663/382460466/229506340?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221207_f_win_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjI5NzE3YS03YTc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KGO-P_mcvfF5qLtCIMIn5dkjSPZ-Buq4a5z3pD-PxDM=) Thank you for everything, The Fair Fight Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55685664/382460467/229506340?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221207_f_win_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjI5NzE3YS03YTc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KGO-P_mcvfF5qLtCIMIn5dkjSPZ-Buq4a5z3pD-PxDM=)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: To put last night in historical perspective, this was the first time a President didn't lose a Senate seat during their first term since Franklin Delano Roosevelt in 1934. Incredible. You helped make this happen, and we’re so happy and grateful to have been a part of it.
body:
You did it!!!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08fc4985-77c0-485f-b898-edbacedabfbc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Dear Peter, Well, we did it. We stayed on the path no matter the obstacles right-wing cranks, Republican operatives, an enabling mainstream media, an oft-vapid culture, corrupt judges and foreign adversaries put in our way. **_Last night we--YOU--re-elected Senator Raphael Warnock, gaining a crucial seat for Democrats. So that we put this in historical perspective, this was the first time a President didn't lose a Senate seat during their first term since Franklin Delano Roosevelt in 1934. Incredible._** And we did this while billionaire weirdos like Peter Thiel were sending tens of millions of dollars into states to elect their vassal candidates, buying Twitter to tweet out crazy-uncle-at-Thanksgiving conspiracy theories and generally do all they could to stop us. **_But this list, this community, stepped up and donated over $480,000 to Democratic candidates and other progressive organizations to make this happen. WOW._** Why did Democrats sweep _everything_ in states like Michigan and Minnesota? Run the table on statewide races in states like Pennsylvania and Arizona? Hold onto and/or win multiple swing congressional seats in states like Virginia and Ohio? Stay within a few seats in the House so we might have a say in who's chosen as Speaker? That was because you guys--grassroots Democrats--realized what was at stake, had enough of being bullied by a minority and bucked history. I've rarely been a part of something so amazing. So I just want to take a moment to thank every one of you. To remind you that everyone makes a difference, and, collectively, nobody can stop us. We'll be in touch--albeit a bit less often--as the holidays approach, but I wanted to take this opportunity to say Happy Holidays! And, again, Thank You! My two boys are being raised in this country, and I feel a lot more hopeful about that fact than I did just a few months ago. Enjoy your holidays and take a bow. You earned it! Cliff [**PS: Appreciate our work finding timely actions and good candidates to share with you? Your $5, $10, or $25 contribution would mean vital support for our network’s efforts to defend the Biden agenda—and important causes like abortion access—in the coming year.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T14bf2d26-85b7-497f-8019-02fc1eb8358b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqcJuDX2HRji8zceUQ74uMPyXwArFUhhEylhu27HuuFZPbUWWTdGH4838vBzdyazPkgGfSEI9dOrau8XGHCENJ6Je06YUb2AtP8-YN1Byq9GBTg8785gsbQ_ffAWduYcoJFeJGPKIW2GP0lyA6ckrkiIOBQq8BWTTYSOnbBMFttEe-zqIZdQwR3LdVJ-XuCCt_0jVGmq5N0exaz48a7rV9CKmMPHRX9tXqWUyv6fjLNGMeNQYJoG2SkP_96e3ZlqxurFY09gIBI2R8QUNaV8mnPnKssrs17DkZkfnAPOgfNMSWPwGeTPBR-boczkhtovyczWCI41IGKzT1B7GpdgJU/3rs/85WOEvPrRceAJI9skkQObg/h0/8Sou60rvFKcgaTmcwE9PxEEu0dg8jQgv3ZqoccGLA8M)
Peter, We did it! Reverend Raphael Warnock needed to win his runoff to give Democrats a true majority in the Senate and Georgia got it done! This is a HUGE deal for Democrats who now have an outright Senate majority, and it’s so important for the people of Georgia, who deserve an honest and competent Senator for the next six years. Here’s a great bonus: Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin just became a little less powerful. Now, neither one of them can single-handedly block progress in the Senate. (Unfortunately, they will still be able to team up from time to time to deny us a majority on critical issues, including on the filibuster – but now it will take both of them agreeing with each other instead of just one of them going rogue.) We’re so grateful for all your hard work and support in electing real Democrats this cycle. With your help, four of our candidates won their Senate races – including Senator Warnock and Senator-elect John Fetterman! Democrats are now in a much stronger position thanks to your help. Now, we turn our attention to replacing Kyrsten Sinema with a real Democrat. We’ll have more to tell you about that soon. For now, we can celebrate. Thanks again – so much. And Happy Holidays! -The team at Save the Senate & Primary Sinema [CHIP IN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqcJuDX2HRji8zceUQ74uM4upaqCmwZERme01Uc144J7PjyD3l4_TdL1rFaeE5jJKxd_JKw2NEYIFQ_cs9yuqbqwFwakrbTOzFk6-4Qtd1UmV0AJR084AhKE0EIEr98sKtnH_Q4GJCOOYzBGFJ0J4gjRKzOe9ovyGTfjudBGcjsP9HgKeJyS-OaRPxDPS52O4r5JUdPzCD7HBt4mTxFHK9_fnFznBURjKx0GSrTdQwb1KKpgwnTL87gzdZGTRkarpjYaNgar8pOAbkglZ0rXYD8IWLxzXNTi6t2wkj3O2LylP_qzyReIX-1I_NPG7ImaY/3rs/85WOEvPrRceAJI9skkQObg/h1/PmC0h1eZGcifBrw_VHdeUueD0AqkNquJTlhfEdrLAn0) | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: | | | Peter, We did it! Reverend Raphael Warnock needed to win his runoff to give Democrats a true majority in the Senate and Georgia got it done! This is a HUGE deal for Democrats who now have an outright Senate majority, and it’s so important for the people of Georgia, who deserve an honest and competent Senator for the next six years. Here’s a great bonus: Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin just became a little less powerful. Now, neither one of them can single-handedly block progress in the Senate. (Unfortunately, they will still be able to team up from time to time to deny us a majority on critical issues, including on the filibuster – but now it will take both of them agreeing with each other instead of just one of them going rogue.) We’re so grateful for all your hard work and support in electing real Democrats this cycle. With your help, four of our candidates won their Senate races – including Senator Warnock and Senator-elect John Fetterman! Democrats are now in a much stronger position thanks to your help. Now, we turn our attention to replacing Kyrsten Sinema with a real Democrat. We’ll have more to tell you about that soon. For now, we can celebrate. Thanks again – so much. And Happy Holidays! -The team at Save the Senate & Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Change for Arizona 2024, please .

Peter, Albany elitists are attempting again to force New Yorkers to _become sitting ducks_ instead of allowing law-abiding people to defend themselves. They couldn’t outright ban concealed carry with Hochul’s unconstitutional law, so now they’re trying to make it illegal to carry everywhere besides your home. **They would rather arm the criminals and allow them to roam our streets than for us to protect ourselves and our loved ones.** Thankfully, a federal judge stepped in to protect New Yorkers’ Second Amendment rights.

Peter, the Second Amendment codifies a person’s right to protect themselves and their loved ones. It was written for _**EVERYONE**_ , not just those in power.
Peter, I’m taking on these radical Leftists working to disarm us, but it’s going to take ALL of us to protect our Second Amendment rights. **Add your name to protect the 2A.**

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A new conservative movement
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas!
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrbhr43328j2ot9an5200965970tm69m58i2ocq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5im8o71cdh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmtvuh8a2u80gr6hcsd6bet91bl29hh1pdoj3dd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5im8o71cdh2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6d2stmtpg3afjg40m7u9om5qv4rii1hs98booo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5im8o71cdh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7j7jjk1f5kt8mfvdkod8gm62k1q0doppc6ps6e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5im8o71cdh2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs6faulhhg0l6afui2m0pcc9h3ndk7tnv4r0qjag_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5im8o71cdh2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zks08bio1gs7jkjr786uhinqg92jhbg8qk8dov6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5im8o71cdh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3mqv8qutu4o6ppaqpe93el0sscv9m267qv6rod8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5im8o71cdh2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcd542dhr0fhpdgfmlbcr1gb2k7dig6k6ikfmrio_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5im8o71cdh2bs)
---
| | [Get my book ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfksqqggpvenb37kqlgssvsupr9d1fot8v4125r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5im8o71cdh2bs)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Virginia Democrats
subject: Congressman A. Donald McEachin Laid to Rest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Derek,

This afternoon, Congressman A. Donald McEachin was laid to rest in his beloved hometown of Richmond.

Congressman McEachin was a pioneer and leader in Virginia. Serving in the House of Delegates, the State Senate, and as a United States Congressman, he embodied the meaning of public service — fighting for the most vulnerable citizens, defending the rights of all Virginians, and being a steadfast champion for the environment.

A person of faith, Congressman McEachin embodied the definition of service. He was a voice of reason, compassion, and was a deeply empathetic leader and friend.

As his family and his nation mourn today, we remain thankful for the life and legacy of Congressman A. Donald McEachin.

We extend our sincere sympathies to his wife, Colette, and the entire McEachin family.

Virginia Democrats

Greg Casar, Delia Ramirez, Max Frost, Summer Lee, and Jasmine Crockett are all like-minded freshmen who I’m pumped to have the opportunity to serve beside. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55686653/382464081/137396421?refcode=E19739-20221207-OrientationWrap-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzA3NDkwYi04MTc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uYWrL0TPMZK01BZpq8WMT4ITO_xVkNtvagUJFJr6IsM=) Then, getting to chat with Senator Elizabeth Warren and give her a HUGE hug of thanks for supporting me in my race. Her fierce advocacy for America’s middle class has been inspirational to me, and I’m excited to collaborate with her in the months and years ahead. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55686654/382464082/137396421?refcode=E19739-20221207-OrientationWrap-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzA3NDkwYi04MTc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uYWrL0TPMZK01BZpq8WMT4ITO_xVkNtvagUJFJr6IsM=) Watching my friend Robert Garcia be elected as freshman class president was awesome! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55686655/382464083/137396421?refcode=E19739-20221207-OrientationWrap-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzA3NDkwYi04MTc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uYWrL0TPMZK01BZpq8WMT4ITO_xVkNtvagUJFJr6IsM=) Joining Speaker Pelosi on the floor of the House was surreal. She is a giant. I am so honored to get to serve with her. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55686656/382464084/137396421?refcode=E19739-20221207-OrientationWrap-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzA3NDkwYi04MTc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uYWrL0TPMZK01BZpq8WMT4ITO_xVkNtvagUJFJr6IsM=) And last but not least!! # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55676646/382430172/2058529741?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmZjYzNmMy01ODc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZTqxfKch7Ggpo3NXeLSG1gYdQRWRoy19GmkDrEbfrfk=&emci=78985288-5076-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=36fcc3f3-5876-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=5086640)
---
Peter,

Right now, abortion is still legal in Pennsylvania. But for many, it is already difficult to access abortion and reproductive health care.

Local abortion funds play a critical role in helping pregnant people receive the care they need, and they need our help to stretch every dollar.

Fortunately, the Abortion Liberation Fund of PA has a unique opportunity to access $100,000 in matching funds pledged by the Poor Richard's Charitable Trust. I'm passing along a note from their team because your support can go even further if you act now.

**[Will you help empower pregnant people and their families to make their own medical decisions? Chip in to support the Abortion Liberation Fund of PA now, and your impact will be doubled.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55676648/382430174/1031922144?cst=w7hPLd&source=arkoosh&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmZjYzNmMy01ODc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZTqxfKch7Ggpo3NXeLSG1gYdQRWRoy19GmkDrEbfrfk=&emci=78985288-5076-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=36fcc3f3-5876-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=5086640)**

As a physician of over two decades, I have sat with pregnant people making incredibly difficult decisions and seen firsthand the challenges and stigma people face in accessing abortions and reproductive health care.

I know that organizations like the Abortion Liberation Fund of PA play a critical role in our health care system, so I hope you'll read the note below and choose to support them too.

Thanks for all that you do,

Val \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Abortion Liberation Fund of PA
Date: Thu, Oct 13, 2022 at 1:39 PM
Subject: Help us raise $100k in matching funds! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55676650/382430176/1031922144?cst=w7hPLd&source=arkoosh&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmZjYzNmMy01ODc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZTqxfKch7Ggpo3NXeLSG1gYdQRWRoy19GmkDrEbfrfk=&emci=78985288-5076-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=36fcc3f3-5876-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=5086640) **$100,000 match running NOW through 12/31/22!** | [Donate here >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55676652/382430178/1031922144?cst=w7hPLd&source=arkoosh&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmZjYzNmMy01ODc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZTqxfKch7Ggpo3NXeLSG1gYdQRWRoy19GmkDrEbfrfk=&emci=78985288-5076-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=36fcc3f3-5876-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=5086640)
---
Hello,

The abortion access landscape continues to evolve following _Dobbs vs. Jackson._

This fiscal year we have budgeted to give out nearly $850k in abortion funding. This is a 40% increase since I started with ALF-PA five years ago — a clear demonstration of the increased needs of our community facing growing restrictions across the country.

While the majority of our funding continues to support Philadelphia and surrounding counties, since Roe was overturned, we have supported people from Arizona, Connecticut, Florida, Georgia, Kentucky, Louisiana, Michigan, North Carolina, Ohio, Oklahoma, South Carolina, Tennessee, Texas, and Virginia — all coming to PA/NJ for care.

Fortunately, our friends at Poor Richard's Charitable Trust have generously offered a $100k pledge to help cover our increased costs, agreeing to match in full your next donation received by December 31, 2022.

Between your support and theirs, we hope to raise at least $200k that will help us fund abortion care, build community power, and foster community support.

**[Whether you have $1 or $1,000 to give, gifts of all sizes make a difference and bolster our ability to fund abortion access! Will you chip in now? This is your chance to double your impact!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55676654/382430180/1031922144?cst=w7hPLd&source=arkoosh&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmZjYzNmMy01ODc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZTqxfKch7Ggpo3NXeLSG1gYdQRWRoy19GmkDrEbfrfk=&emci=78985288-5076-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=36fcc3f3-5876-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=5086640)**

What gifts are eligible? All new gifts! If you choose to increase a recurring donation, the increased amount will be matched as well. Please email **[sydney@abortionfundpa.org](mailto:sydney@abortionfundpa.org)** if you are interested in increasing your recurring donation. Monthly donations are a great way to have a sustained impact on our work, consider becoming a monthly donor today!

Not in a place to make a donation? We totally get that! You can always help by forwarding this email to your network.

Thank you for being part of our incredible story of our community coming together to ensure justice where it has been denied. We appreciate you.

In Solidarity,

Elicia Gonzales
Executive Director

name: Chair Jaime Harrison
subject: Our victories this year were only possible because of the early and continued investment from folks like you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Thank you for everything you do to help elect Democrats. Despite historical trends against us and the GOP pouring hundreds of millions of dollars into races across the country, Democrats defied the odds in this year’s midterm elections. | |
---
Derek, I wanted to reach out to say _thank you_. Despite historical trends and the GOP pouring hundreds of millions of dollars into races across the country, Democrats defied the odds, expanded our Senate majority, and lost fewer seats in the House than in any Democratic president’s first midterm election in at least 40 years. Look no further than last night’s victory for proof of our movement’s power: We won Georgia _again._ We have grassroots donors and activists like you to thank for that. After electing Democrats up and down the ballot on Election Day, we didn’t take a moment to rest. We turned right around and helped send my friend Raphael Warnock back to the Senate. **Supporters like you dug deep and worked tirelessly to fight for every last vote. And we got the job done --_together_. ** I’ve seen the power of this grassroots team, and I know this victory is just the start of what we will continue to accomplish together. I’ll be in touch soon about what’s next -- but today, let’s celebrate! Thanks for being a part of this team, Jaime Jaime Harrison
Chair
Democratic National Committee
[](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJ3oDEPNIBpOo7uCgwnD2SG7oQTsrfBePTpoPiouTmSq-FBGJ4g7Kh4xH_s4nnLM7ESmEnpREddqfEDEs5vqNppbem3A7FqgU_-2yH0MHgzvE3VtAbFPm_tO6q28MAZVU7u_9IJcz8lKnGykY6fVwbGX34G0oW9A1TJ4JjgGYirYPOKdAdG7ziNLb6l7-xzM61sifFx9fNgli7i6dF4C7Fkx8CP1BflHV_aUr0Wt9t0qYhPBAWBfoDcwXHWfW1WLajfeAVEbob-mrQnvG8xD4XyToCqmihqXEEOdG2Ovbe12JKgTV1dlRz2eErvm0fa33AEqp0ajhPbP4Cw1_OsPbs5o2ivI6QdzLCC6jilZ8YDWTVsQdfgYYFu1rQHn40HKCCTbEFHbr4ISEZN1IVdECi7GcR3OJn_L7Sh4KLtE0cYbyhWV_gSV6wc5tP89WXqQzNTEGoqYBztnqyrbbmaItcpg/3rs/axxPiyyOT7adJRMK1Ex8mQ/h0/8jclmHRRsb9__XdTRNybevLltebbabx8BEIHfWwqWEo)

subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD b
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg4pprfdijb92cie5l8qt4otnnh9gh2bacpmkoqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5im4p76chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onk64p39chl62r7cdphedr71pj16uqmcp5km4pmad5m61h73c356poeap9mm5gb0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74s366libbcb0ethmcc5gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt9ocs78cs6hgh4ilss1rl4cqv7lpugaotpvspc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5im4p76chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z92ofobm0rnuvv6pg5u5otg3slbp985sss479do0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5im4p76chh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt9qanbdtubhgqd1rp6sh59121kpg0uafjvvvad8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5im4p76chh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: End the broken promises.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
It's crucial that our government lives up to the promises it's made in the past and honors its trust and treaty obligations with Tribal communities.
Peter,

I am proud to join Senator Elizabeth Warren in introducing the _Honoring Promises to Native Nations Act._

For years, our government has failed to live up to the responsibilities presented in centuries worth of treaties with Tribal nations. That's why I've worked over several years with the U.S. Commission on Civil Rights to identify the failures of the federal government in meeting those obligations - and to lay out a strategy for addressing them.

The _Honoring Promises to Native Nations Act_ , which was written with extensive input from tribal leaders, would act as a significant legal framework to address the U.S. government's habitual under-funding of Tribal nations - specifically, as it pertains to health care, education, housing, public safety, and economic development.

**[I hope you'll join me in urging Congress to pass this vital legislation by adding your name next to mine and signing on as a citizen co-sponsor of the _Honoring Native Nations Act today._ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/qWgXyMLkQG8lEr-DTvroteN7J3Tri9ackMTA0OhyYaE=/Azt6K5gc53pQlPCXq-6oQALGACF0yD1KSCHRQa6binU=?ms=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**
[SIGN ON AS A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://act.myngp.com/el/qWgXyMLkQG8lEr-DTvroteN7J3Tri9ackMTA0OhyYaE=/Azt6K5gc53pQlPCXq-6oQALGACF0yD1KSCHRQa6binU=?ms=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})
It's simple: Our government has a moral and legal obligation to live up to the promises it made in the past and honor its trust and treaty obligations with Tribal communities. This bill would allot mandatory federal spending in key areas where our government has long neglected its responsibilities - and would acknowledge that these investments cannot and should not be optional.

I'm proud to introduce this legislation with Senator Warren and believe it is a step toward helping reverse the decades-long pattern of systemic underfunding of Native communities and to strengthen federal programs that support Indian Country.

**[Please add your name next to mine if you agree Congress should move swiftly to enact this legislation. It is long overdue.](https://act.myngp.com/el/qWgXyMLkQG8lEr-DTvroteN7J3Tri9ackMTA0OhyYaE=/Azt6K5gc53pQlPCXq-6oQALGACF0yD1KSCHRQa6binU=?ms=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}}
)**

As always, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/qWgXyMLkQG8lEr-DTvroteN7J3Tri9ackMTA0OhyYaE=/rrC1arRQEupGfPS8irZiJ7Nbwwf649YGIYzrg3Bce0c=?refcode=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}})

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qWgXyMLkQG8lEr-DTvroteN7J3Tri9ackMTA0OhyYaE=/qQE8ndbOF66QaupNDxXMpGSpu1gJ1aydxpwf6dn3c0w=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qWgXyMLkQG8lEr-DTvroteN7J3Tri9ackMTA0OhyYaE=/dODEapTuX5ssAYJgqZNNxyCZ8cHcjOITPIbK0mEKV6A=)
---|---
Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---

PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/qWgXyMLkQG8lEr-DTvroteN7J3Tri9ackMTA0OhyYaE=/rrC1arRQEupGfPS8irZiJ7Nbwwf649YGIYzrg3Bce0c=?refcode=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221207_honori_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}})
Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/qWgXyMLkQG8lEr-DTvroteN7J3Tri9ackMTA0OhyYaE=/W9wl7NAgNoJS-bIuAgP8XgSoqNTXGTt-yFislrTaqKI=).

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Team, it's Chuck Schumer. I'm writing to say THANK YOU!

Because of YOU and every single Democrat reading this email, we defied the odds, _kept the Senate blue,**and won our 51st seat!**_ This performance will go down in history, thanks to tireless and passionate supporters like you.

But our work is just getting started: With our expanded majority, Democrats need to keep delivering for the American people -- and we need your early support to defend the Senate again in 2024.

It won’t be easy, either: This year, we only caught a glimpse of what Mitch McConnell's megadonors are capable of -- and with Trump himself already leading the Republican charge in 2024, **it's going to take ALL of us to stop an ultra-MAGA GOP takeover.**

**[So I’m personally asking you: The race for the Senate in 2024 has already begun. Will you pitch in $5 right now to help Democrats defend our hard-won majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221207-ChuckSchumer-SchumerRunoffThankYouRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221207-ChuckSchumer-SchumerRunoffThankYouRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9135%2E9716520%2ErZj9lY)**

Before the election, I wrote to you a lot about how we would feel -- and how our coffee would taste -- the day after the election if we put everything on the line and came through. **Well I don't know about you, but my coffee this morning tasted pretty damn good.**

That's why I’m asking you to stay in this fight: Because we have to start thinking about 2024 and asking ourselves **_right now_** whether we're doing everything we possibly can to win. It's the only chance we have to stop Trump's takeover, defend our Democratic Senate, and keep America moving forward.

**[So please, if you can, chip in $5 before midnight to help defend our Senate majority for years to come:](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221207-ChuckSchumer-SchumerRunoffThankYouRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221207-ChuckSchumer-SchumerRunoffThankYouRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9135%2E9716520%2ErZj9lY)**

We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: American Briefing

| [ NFL QB Andrew Luck Finally Reveals Why He Mysteriously Retired ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42062%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kt92%2fNonQzZvLgxc1geROg&sysid=1)
---
[ Andrew Luck played only seven seasons in the NFL, and retired at the age of just 29 years old. Before retiring, Luck was viewed as one of the greatest quarterback prospects of all time when he came out of Stanford and entered the NFL draft in 2012. Entering the 2012 draft class, even with prospects like Robert Griffin III in the same class, Luck was viewed as more than a can’t-miss prospect, after earning a 97/100 draft grade and putting him in the same conversation as John Elway, Josh Allen, and Peyton Manning. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42063%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AIt0pOcFt0qGTaDCXY4jKg&sysid=1)

We’ve officially reelected Sen. Raphael Warnock, holding onto Georgia’s critical Democratic Senate seat.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55682120/382441573/294255004?refcode=EM_FR_221207Victory_N_CAUCUS_30DO_4_NG_N_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWExZTE2Zi02Mzc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GIzJCy4HU6OZ5r4S5u4pJMIJVHqQLOKYiQv4oCyZ6aY=) Way to go, Peter.

Thanks to you, our grassroots supporters, and the thousands of Georgia Democrats who showed up to the polls, we’ve officially reelected Sen. Raphael Warnock, holding onto Georgia’s critical Democratic Senate seat.

Having strong Democratic partners in Washington is key to the progress we’re fighting for every day in Georgia’s State Legislature. Together we can make critical strides toward making healthcare and prescription drugs more affordable, protecting our reproductive and voting rights, and building an economy that works for us all.

We’ve made so much progress in this election, but we can’t stop here. We must continue down the path of increasing Democratic power in Georgia and flip our Republican-held legislature.

Thanks again for joining us in the fight for a **_BLUE_** Georgia.

Onward,

Georgia House Democrats | The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to _flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia._ **To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today?**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We need to close this gap ASAP.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/8EW3hwb4vdJE/dzNkWnd1aDRMaXRNRFVsTTYwWjE4UE12TlFqVTFTU1laRXA0TkZ2VFpVOXJYdkFMTG1DZkVTVWRRbzRmb245UFNsQWxSS05IbEUrc0pqYnlqb1EyTGdEMmxyZ2x3eEE3ZjlMZVY2WHJFNE09S0/Q01uZjFBUy9Gek1sWWxDV1UvNnhReERqejhJR2ZsT3kvZ01EZGxkTXcwcz0S1) Friend -- As I prepare for Washington's legislative session, these are a few of the issues at the top of my list: | ✔️Enshrining choice in our state constitution | ✔️Tackling homelessness
---|---
✔️Fighting the climate crisis | ✔️Improving access to mental health care
But starting Friday at midnight, our campaign won't be able to raise the funds needed to address these crucial issues for more than four months! **All the while, out-of-state special interests -- Big Oil and anti-choice groups included -- can raise and spend millions attacking our agenda.**
It's up to all of us to ensure we have the resources we need to fight back against the far right's assault on our agenda. And right now, we're still $14,195 short of reaching our $50,000 Beat the Freeze goal.
[_**We need to close this gap, ASAP. Will you make a contribution of $10 right now, so we can hit our $50,000 Beat the Freeze goal and keep moving Washington state forward?**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/YGD4cE0egXQr/dzNkWnd1aDRMaXRNRFVsTTYwWjE4UE12TlFqVTFTU1laRXA0TkZ2VFpVOXJYdkFMTG1DZkVTVWRRbzRmb245UFNsQWxSS05IbEUrc0pqYnlqb1EyTGdEMmxyZ2x3eEE3ZjlMZVY2WHJFNE09S0/Q01uZjFBUy9Gek1sWWxDV1UvNnhReERqejhJR2ZsT3kvZ01EZGxkTXcwcz0S1)
[](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/YGD4cE0egXQr/dzNkWnd1aDRMaXRNRFVsTTYwWjE4UE12TlFqVTFTU1laRXA0TkZ2VFpVOXJYdkFMTG1DZkVTVWRRbzRmb245UFNsQWxSS05IbEUrc0pqYnlqb1EyTGdEMmxyZ2x3eEE3ZjlMZVY2WHJFNE09S0/Q01uZjFBUy9Gek1sWWxDV1UvNnhReERqejhJR2ZsT3kvZ01EZGxkTXcwcz0S1)
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/qk8KM_b6ZGQK/dzNkWnd1aDRMaXRNRFVsTTYwWjE4UE12TlFqVTFTU1laRXA0TkZ2VFpVOXJYdkFMTG1DZkVTVWRRbzRmb245UFNsQWxSS05IbEUrc0pqYnlqb1EyTGdEMmxyZ2x3eEE3ZjlMZVY2WHJFNE09S0/Q01uZjFBUy9Gek1sWWxDV1UvNnhReERqejhJR2ZsT3kvZ01EZGxkTXcwcz0S1)
---
After returning from the U.N. Climate Change Conference last month, this phrase from the World Health Organization stuck with me: "Climate change is already killing us, but strong action now can prevent more deaths." We must take bold, visionary action -- together -- to prevent further loss of life from climate disaster.
And since the Supreme Court's radical decision to overturn Roe v. Wade, I made a commitment: Washington must enshrine the right to choose in its constitution. We will never go backwards to a time when dangerous, back-alley abortions were many folks' only options.
This legislative session, we are going to get things done -- on these and so many more issues. Because frankly, if we don't, future generations will pay the price.
[_**But we can only keep up this fight by coming together and hitting this Beat the Freeze goal -- before Friday at midnight. Let 's not come up short. Chip in $10 right now, so we can keep Washington state moving forward.**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/YGD4cE0egXQr/dzNkWnd1aDRMaXRNRFVsTTYwWjE4UE12TlFqVTFTU1laRXA0TkZ2VFpVOXJYdkFMTG1DZkVTVWRRbzRmb245UFNsQWxSS05IbEUrc0pqYnlqb1EyTGdEMmxyZ2x3eEE3ZjlMZVY2WHJFNE09S0/Q01uZjFBUy9Gek1sWWxDV1UvNnhReERqejhJR2ZsT3kvZ01EZGxkTXcwcz0S1)

Trump’s MAGA base is FINALLY starting to turn its back on him – YES!

After spewing hate, letting Americans die of COVID-19, inciting a deadly attack on our nation’s capital, and tearing our democracy to shreds, Trump is desperately trying to get back to power.

But many Americans aren’t falling for it this time around! They’re starting to support Liz Cheney after she’s called out Trump at every turn.

**Losing the White House to any Republican would be terrible. There are still MILLIONS across the country who are in Trump's corner despite Cheney’s early lead. So we must have up-to-date data to begin preparing for 2024!**

So we need to hear from 500 top Democrats right now:
[**Do you think Liz Cheney can DEFEAT Donald Trump in 2024?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Cheney-vs-Trump/?source=VPP_20221207_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=11&akid=5753%2E878179%2Eak8V0n)

name: Sean Themea
subject: The Biggest Liberty Victory of 2022
body:
We’ve built a bench of 325 hardcore liberty legislators!
[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxVUFFvgyAY_DX4psFPxfXBh21Nu6TJlj3uiTD5sHQgFjGu-_XD1i5ZQiDc8d1xh03OalqWJQAkshFMKJSJboAC5EBroDkrH7KWMqWKvM7ZpmZFsSElRSu0yUQ-C--ds1nrbHJsSlQbiapSTNFcFAVK1ebIKNBPsUEGiWmOIQwjKR4J7OIasZ08ZqJH6cIiErGLMG0ZT2dTN0tS7KZguUWpJ0uK7dWYAFvA0U2-xQj2reHCDkary0q18Sp010fyFiWNsly6XgTteu6GoK3-Qb7-n0NFDXZ6NCI4P_JP777Qiw75vYq7rusD9uHmmcLLN75Xh_NFRpr3RsvF7z941DLm3e5lPbE3D4lv5DBrY_TI6lhkdy1yqW8N0JD6iQBcxwCuTcH5Y7Z-OtnDPjWHU3pmr7ZaSHiOe7gM-PdyFcnWmoDU219u15tK)

Friend,

**Young Americans for Liberty achieved one of the most significant victories in the liberty movement this decade! **

My name is Sean Themea, and I am the chief of staff at Young Americans for Liberty (YAL). YAL is the nation's largest, most active, and most effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty in American politics.

Four years ago, YAL launched _Operation Win at the Door_ and set the audacious goal of building a coalition of 250 state representatives.

And this year, we blew our goal out of the water.

**We 've built a bench of 325 hardcore liberty legislators!**

YAL student activists knocked on over 3.8 MILLION doors to make this happen!

Their commitment to liberty is unmatched, and we are so proud of our many dedicated, hardworking students.

While the massive red wave America was expecting didn't happen at the national level, we had a _**liberty wave**_ at the state level. That's why it's more important than ever that YAL student activists knock doors for liberty candidates on the local level.

Now that we have a coalition of over 325 legislators across the country, we must pass legislation that supports school choice, constitutional carry, and medical freedom.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkEFv4yAQhX8NvtnCA4bk4MPuRukh0vbUw57QxGCHBoyLsdz01y9J3R4qIRDvwZuZz7S1kJRzDgCFblFgb3RhW6AANVAJtBZ8V3VU9D2rZS32UjC2J5waj9ZVWK8YYwi-6oIvLi3ud2du-vqMTOimoTvERtKeMtl3HDkWrr2kNM2E_SJwzGs23RJNhaPRId1DsnZD1_F8Bl-GVRN2XJJX3mi7eMIOj8IExF2cwxI7k8Wxcwr95Gx_26wuX9EOYzY_RylzrNJhxGTDqMKUrLcfRm39K2ioM4OdHaYQZ3WO4WoiDkZ9ofjKDWMyY_qsWbLrkHB3enlfs61GZ3O7hx_ixeo87-FJy0U8Ryhiq6fVOmdnITPI4QHyjm8boCXyNwF4fAN4kIK3f6uPy6s_PZXu9Fq-ib--uZvwJ-_pNpnvl1tItWECIg__Af9Imzg)

This liberty wave is going to change the direction of our country.

These hardcore liberty legislators won't let the Federal government get away with COVID lockdowns, forcing experimental vaccines on kids, or take away stealing your guns.

YAL is focused on the state level because we know that is where so many of the policies are made that influence our lives on a daily basis.

Over the last two years, our coalition of pro-liberty state reps has passed hundreds of pro-liberty bills.

clean_body: We’ve built a bench of 325 hardcore liberty legislators! Friend, Young Americans for Liberty achieved one of the most significant victories in the liberty movement this decade! My name is Sean Themea, and I am the chief of staff at Young Americans for Liberty (YAL). YAL is the nation's largest, most active, and most effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty in American politics. Four years ago, YAL launched Operation Win at the Door and set the audacious goal of building a coalition of 250 state representatives. And this year, we blew our goal out of the water. We 've built a bench of 325 hardcore liberty legislators! YAL student activists knocked on over 3.8 MILLION doors to make this happen! Their commitment to liberty is unmatched, and we are so proud of our many dedicated, hardworking students. While the massive red wave America was expecting didn't happen at the national level, we had a liberty wave at the state level. That's why it's more important than ever that YAL student activists knock doors for liberty candidates on the local level. Now that we have a coalition of over 325 legislators across the country, we must pass legislation that supports school choice, constitutional carry, and medical freedom. This liberty wave is going to change the direction of our country. These hardcore liberty legislators won't let the Federal government get away with COVID lockdowns, forcing experimental vaccines on kids, or take away stealing your guns. YAL is focused on the state level because we know that is where so many of the policies are made that influence our lives on a daily basis. Over the last two years, our coalition of pro-liberty state reps has passed hundreds of pro-liberty bills. In 2021, this coalition made 88 million Americans more free! In 2022, it made 91 million Americans more free! For 2023, with our expanded coalition, we plan to make 100 million Americans more free! Can you join us in this fight for freedom? Click below to donate. For Liberty, Sean Themea Chief of Staff Young Americans for Liberty Young Americans for Liberty, Inc. is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Donations or gifts to Young Americans for Liberty, Inc. are not deductible as charitable donations for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any donation.

body:
See for yourself: | | | Peter
---
| | | | The Daily Wire’s Matt Walsh has a lot of great things to say- but this might just be the best thing he’s ever said.
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ae48c20a68&e=fdefed58de)

“The 1776 Project PAC claims that it has flipped over 100 school boards since November last year... The argument for pare” **What’s the 1776 Project PAC and why is Matt Walsh talking about them on his show?** You may already know, but my name is Ryan Girdusky, and over the last year, I’ve traveled the country to work with conservative school board candidates who are determined to take back our schools from the crazed radical left. **In ONE YEAR we’ve flipped over 100 school board seats from liberal to conservative!** _AND 60% of ALL the candidates we’ve supported have won their races._ Friend the ONLY way to save our children from leftist indoctrination and Critical Race Theory is to take back our schools, one county at a time. And we’ve proven that, with your support and the support of patriots like you, we CAN and WILL do it. **[Will you chip in take back our schools from the ground up with a donation of $17.76 or more today?](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=733fe452e4&e=fdefed58de)** For too long our schools have been run by people who hate our country and don’t share our values. Thank you in advance for joining the 1776 Project PAC Team. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky Founder, 1776 Project PAC

I'm calling on my most LOYAL and steadfast supporters to STAND WITH ME against this HOAX. I need YOU to get on the team as an AMERICAN DEFENDER and tell the Left that ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. I've been going through these hoaxes and scams ever since the day I took my famous escalator ride in Trump Tower in 2015. THIS HAS TO END. Our Country is the laughingstock of the World, and Joe Biden is a corrupt and incompetent political hack. I know you agree, Friend, and this is your chance to publicly show where you stand! name: United Rural Democrats
subject: Raphael Warnock wins Georgia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Good news alert | | | Hi Peter – In case you didn't already hear the news, Raphael Warnock won reelection in Georgia to the U.S. Senate. **He beat GOP candidate Herschel Walker by more than 95,000 votes.** While we expect the Republicans may try recount tactics or other partisan games, we know this for sure: _Georgia chose a Democrat in November and again in December._ We have to thank Georgia voters, organizers, community leaders, and supporters from across the country who have made this win possible. **Warnock represents the best of what Democrats have to offer, especially for rural Americans.** His humility, faith, commitment to public service, and ability to listen and connect with his constituents propelled him to win this election – and make real change in Washington. **He has been a champion for rural communities** , passing legislation that provided rural voters with expanded access to health care, broadband, infrastructure, and economic opportunity. He has advocated for these important priorities without stoking division or succumbing to misinformation. We look forward to continuing supporting Sen. Warnock and his fight to help rural Americans. We’re also proud to have helped raise his campaign over $1,000 dollars from many grassroots donations. Your contributions helped spread the word and get out the vote for this historic campaign. Again, thank you, Peter, for your support in our efforts to elect Democrats like Sen. Warnock. \-- United Rural Democrats
---

United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. **Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?**

name: Team AOC
subject: Victory in Georgia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Together our movement raised $67,174 to support Raphael Warnock’s campaign.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221207-3685-header&t=1&akid=3685%2E2526796%2EARVopW)
We did it!
**Reverend Raphael Warnock won his senate runoff and reelection last night in Georgia!** This win secures a 51st Democratic senator, and will improve our chances of expanding Medicare for All, lowering the rising costs of living, strengthening Social Security, preserving reproductive freedoms, and protecting our democracy.
**Together our movement raised a total of $67,174.70 to directly support Raphael Warnock’s campaign.** We also mobilized over 300 volunteers for virtual events with Georgia Votes, and for youth voter outreach with Sunrise Movement.
Senator Warnock was up against a multi-millionaire, with a net worth estimated to be nearly $65 million1, who didn’t even reside in the state. Republicans were confident they could buy this election, but we proved them wrong.
**But we won’t stop here.** Alexandria experienced firsthand how difficult it is for working-class, grassroots candidates to break into politics, and that’s why she launched Courage to Change: a leadership PAC that supports candidates who refuse to bow to establishment pressure, who advocate ferociously for working-class families, and who have lived the same struggles as the people they seek to represent.
**Through Alexandria’s and our movement's efforts, this midterm cycle we helped elect progressive champions: Summer Lee in Pennsylvania, Greg Casar in Texas, helped re-elect Katie Porter in California, and now Raphael Warnock in Georgia!**
[Can you help us continue to elect progressive community leaders, activists, and working-class candidates across the country by splitting a $3 contribution between Courage to Change and our campaign today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221207.sCSCBh&refcode=em20221207-3685-P_FND_ANO_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3685%2E2526796%2EARVopW)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221207.sCSCBh&refcode=em20221207-3685-P_FND_ANO_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3685%2E2526796%2EARVopW)**
Together, we will continue to build the infrastructure to elect grassroots, progressive leaders and change the way politics are funded.
Thank you for being a part of our movement,
Team AOC

1 - [Yahoo!](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15247?t=22&akid=3685%2E2526796%2EARVopW)
*PAC stands for Political Action Committee. PACs have been around since 1944 and exist for the purpose of raising and spending money to elect and defeat candidates. Too often, PACs are used by corporations and dark money groups to buy off politicians. Unlike super PACs that can take unlimited money from billionaires, Courage to Change is a leadership PAC that runs via small-dollar donations.

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221207?refcode=em20221207-3685-P_FND_ANO_MIS&t=23&refcode2=3685_2526796_ARVopW&akid=3685%2E2526796%2EARVopW)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221207-3685-P_FND_ANO_MIS&t=24&akid=3685%2E2526796%2EARVopW)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=3685%2E2526796%2EARVopW) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=3685%2E2526796%2EARVopW) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=3685%2E2526796%2EARVopW)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Larry Hogan
subject: Stand with the Constitution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by An America United](https://links
body:
| | | I can't believe that this has to be said, my fellow American... _**... but the Constitution is not the problem.**_ While we may not be surprised by Former President Trump's suggestion that we throw the Constitution to the wind – we must stand up and reject this dangerous direction for the Republican Party. We MUST move past Trump and the toxic politics that follow him. He's torn through the Republican Party. Now he's going after the Constitution, the sacred document that gave us the representative republic we're blessed to live in today. I'm standing on the side of American heroes like George Washington, Abraham Lincoln, Ronald Reagan, and countless past and present military service men and women who have sacrificed and died to defend the freedoms our Constitution guarantees. [**Stand with me and An America United by chipping in $10 or more today to help us defend our Constitution.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=ef56108ccbda4fb9a0875f5f56065c2e&_e=0Ea67wHIczHsN8xZqqg737N8x3YT47igGuVo73fExI0oe1wsvi64akv7QDXAzPY2zJyU3go1FOOXu5pWEKOdvZ_pTDRr3KpXFXMohB6G63JcKulWANI1SDsKYAAKnS4zkhI88j4RSJKGGfjX-GfInWuaBYLJCSb16kS1jX-QPuV_-7Cxcp3bVwquyeVVEFtu5OfPtcxcK_2JdgKGLEKR28Asl3goEj3gKY7716sCicOjy_WdqNB6TcGmYDI8ddUCSPWfHS2On2l2MDIA5o2OEA%3D%3D)

Thank you,
**Governor Larry Hogan**

clean_body: | | | I can't believe that this has to be said, my fellow American... ... but the Constitution is not the problem. While we may not be surprised by Former President Trump's suggestion that we throw the Constitution to the wind – we must stand up and reject this dangerous direction for the Republican Party. We MUST move past Trump and the toxic politics that follow him. He's torn through the Republican Party. Now he's going after the Constitution, the sacred document that gave us the representative republic we're blessed to live in today. I'm standing on the side of American heroes like George Washington, Abraham Lincoln, Ronald Reagan, and countless past and present military service men and women who have sacrificed and died to defend the freedoms our Constitution guarantees. Thank you, Governor Larry Hogan | | | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | | | | | |

name: Katie Porter
subject: Showing voters democracy can work for them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
As Democrats, we need to show everyone that our government and our democracy can work for them.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15530%2E3422442%2EIFoQaM)
Derek, I often get asked how Democrats can reach young voters, a key group we need to engage in every state to win up and down the ballot.
Our campaign reached young voters through consistent online ads on the platforms they use most, we texted, and we organized students and knocked on dorm doors at UC Irvine. I even went to UC Irvine with a student who dressed up as Pikachu and registered new voters!
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE07_MOB20221207_V1_F&t=2&akid=15530%2E3422442%2EIFoQaM)
But here’s what I tell people who ask about engaging young voters: **As Democrats, we need to show**** _everyone_****that our government and our democracy can work for them.** That means having elected officials who are responsive and represent their voters, not special interests. It means having an economy that actually works for working people. And it means successfully communicating when we pass meaningful legislation—it’s my job as an elected official to tell my constituents how I can help—not the other way around!**A strong economy, that doesn’t leave people behind, will help us have a strong democracy.**
Thanks to your support, our campaign was able to deliver that message and show voters what was at stake. We couldn't have won without reaching young voters from all walks of life, and your donations allowed us to do that.
Onwards,
Katie Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE07_MOB20221207_V1_F&t=3&akid=15530%2E3422442%2EIFoQaM)**

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=4&akid=15530%2E3422442%2EIFoQaM)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=15530%2E3422442%2EIFoQaM).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

Howdy Fellow Conservative, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it, Fellow Conservative.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today.

Governor Kristi Noem

name: Our Revolution
subject: Our Revolution members were critical to Senator Warnock's victory!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Thanks to the support of Our Revolution
members across the country, we played a decisive role in re-electing
Senator Warnock and defeating Trump's handpicked candidate Herschel
Walker!

It’s a good day to be a progressive and a bad day to be Joe Manchin. Not
only did we clinch the 51st Senate vote to end the Manchin administration,
we also won Round 2 against his dirty deal to fast-track fossil fuels and
hurt frontline communities.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8106?refcode=OR_EM_NONMEMBERS_20221207_1_3&t=1011&akid=3820%2E5885482%2EpVV9d5 ]We could only make early investments in organizing because we knew we
could rely on consistent revenue from our sustaining members. Can we count
on you to help fund future victories by making a $5 monthly contribution
to Our Revolution?

Recurring contributions enable us to plan ahead and make investments
necessary to jump into rapid response for policy fights like the Dirty
Deal and to scale up our voter turnout work at the most critical times.

In Georgia, we zeroed in on our more than 150,000 Our Revolution Georgia
members and made over half a million voter contacts through text, phone
calls, and other outreach.

We proved, once again, that when we organize, we win. This election came
down to voter mobilization, and our one-on-one conversations with young,
progressive, independent, and working-class voters helped lift Senator
Warnock to victory.

Our organizers and volunteers spoke to many Georgians of all backgrounds
who would not have voted without our outreach. Many were confused about
the runoff, and others reported negative feelings toward the Democratic
Party.

Still, our callers helped persuade them to cast a ballot by contrasting
Sen. Warnock and Walker. Folks were moved by the need for a 51st Senate
vote to diminish the power of Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema.

One Our Revolution phone banker, Paulina, spoke to a young man who wanted
to vote but was shocked to learn his polling location had changed and was
grateful for the call. Organizing is the antidote to voter suppression.

These are the votes that Democrats cannot afford to let slip through the
cracks, and voters deserve the extra effort it takes to ensure they're
empowered with the information they need to make their voices heard at the
ballot box.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8106?refcode=OR_EM_NONMEMBERS_20221207_1_3&t=1012&akid=3820%2E5885482%2EpVV9d5 ]Our work in Georgia and against Manchin’s dirty deal show we can win
these fights! Can we count on you to help fund future victories by
becoming an official member by making a $5 recurring contribution to Our
Revolution?

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

PS: Make sure to keep up with us on [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?refcode=OR_EM_NONMEMBERS_20221207_1_3&t=1013&akid=3820%2E5885482%2EpVV9d5 ]Facebook and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?refcode=OR_EM_NONMEMBERS_20221207_1_3&t=1014&akid=3820%2E5885482%2EpVV9d5 ]Twitter!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=3820%2E5885482%2EpVV9d5 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=3820%2E5885482%2EpVV9d5 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=3820%2E5885482%2EpVV9d5 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=3820%2E5885482%2EpVV9d5 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=3820%2E5885482%2EpVV9d5 ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/signup_2109/?t=1006&akid=3820%2E5885482%2EpVV9d5 ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=OR_EM_NONMEMBERS_20221207_1_3._nFs_k&t=1007&akid=3820%2E5885482%2EpVV9d5 ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed
progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of
power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=OR_EM_NONMEMBERS_20221207_1_3.G7Z2IE&t=1008&akid=3820%2E5885482%2EpVV9d5 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=OR_EM_NONMEMBERS_20221207_1_3.p-eKMt&t=1009&akid=3820%2E5885482%2EpVV9d5 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=OR_EM_NONMEMBERS_20221207_1_3.Y5paYI&t=1010&akid=3820%2E5885482%2EpVV9d5 ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=3820%2E5885482%2EpVV9d5

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as

[ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! body:
This is how we can secure Republican priorities without a majority | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=08fdcef336&e=6a281f566d)

| |

| Peter --

It is the holiday season and there is NO better way to get into the giving mood than giving Washington state a chance to restore Safety, return affordability, and bring accountability back to our state Government!

Let's Go Washington has been gathering signatures to get ELEVEN different initiatives on the 2023 ballot. As we know, when it comes to Initiatives - Republican Priorities often WIN with the voters! **> >>We only have until December 31st to [gather signatures](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b86dd1bbbf&e=6a281f566d) <<<**

| We won't have a legislative majority in the 2023 session, but **we can still make a SUBSTANTIAL difference in Washington's future. **

I encourage you to check out all the initiatives at [www.letsgowa.com](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=a2e7360044&e=6a281f566d), then sign and submit your signature at a signing location near you - encourage your family and friends to do so as well!

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Southern Border Report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, Will Joe Biden and the Democrats ever take our southern border crisis seriously? Every day we watch DRUGS, GUNS, and even worse, _HUMAN BEINGS_ , trafficked across the border by lawless cartels. The human toll of these _reckless_ policies is incalculable.

U.S. Customs and Border Protection, whose rank-and-file officers have been scapegoated and demoralized by the Biden Administration’s dangerous policies, reported that _DOZENS_ of individuals on the terrorist watch list were captured at the border! The real question is this— if dozens were captured, _how many more got away??_

We need **ACCOUNTABILITY AT THE BORDER** , but we _WON’T_ get it from the Democrats. We must [**_HOLD THEM ACCOUNTABLE_**.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=cc6d5355aaf9427b8a932b2040ba6b58&_e=flUQYZYuNOztKadbZ2EZ1CeBjFkiSAwfHtdDO7Xr_I7j9zZ4vS-SdXLG73B0HsCwAr1a2zln077J9DMK_MSRIKvcFY05KUhamQWzKE8yAcyvK-fkD9iOhd-9ePeO1pnjJocGZaKHccw6MoIdpSIi5JH_5_P48hkAvs2MYEPbkti4VZYRGA9MK8nD2YF20XLjJTgOAx_kp6jR9se8CssCF0as6VH9t_fYngwe_exH_EvWvo4oQeMFcJId9MWZPUtUAeRkdV3-h7I3fIuK1eO1Ym9gbSKSl_NM6VkZonw2B_ue6zZhmjVy6isaKZcdqp46qx83lib9o54fPnSMmFpvxA%3D%3D)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Reverend Warnock is the real deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The 2022 election year ends with a big victory.
#
Peter,
Georgia did it again.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24760?refcode=em20221207-1931&t=1&akid=1931%2E420207%2EJC2_WQ)
Last night, voters in Georgia turned out to send Reverend Warnock back to the Senate. This would not have been possible without a diverse coalition of Black, Brown, AAPI, Latino, immigrant, and working-class voters, who propelled Senator Warnock to victory.
I’m so excited to continue working with Reverend Warnock to deliver for working people and families across the country.
[**With Rev. Warnock in the Senate, we have an expanded majority that can let us fight for working families. Will you donate $3 — or whatever you can — to continue to support our progressive movement?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24760?refcode=em20221207-1931&t=2&akid=1931%2E420207%2EJC2_WQ)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24760?refcode=em20221207-1931&t=21&akid=1931%2E420207%2EJC2_WQ)**
Reverend Warnock ran a people-centered campaign aimed at bringing real relief to working families - and Georgians took note. When you organize a diverse, engaged coalition, you leave no votes on the table and you WIN! Senator Warnock is the real deal; he will keep fighting to lift up working Georgians and be a true representative of his state and the diverse communities within it.
We are so lucky to have Reverend Warnock back in the Senate. I’m looking forward to continuing to work with Reverend Warnock as we fight for meaningful, lifesaving policies that make a difference for our communities.
[**With a crucial 51-49 majority in the Senate, our progressive bloc in the House can continue to fight for the policies that benefit working Americans. Will you donate so we can continue building the diverse, progressive movement that will fight for us all?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24760?refcode=em20221207-1931&t=22&akid=1931%2E420207%2EJC2_WQ)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24760?refcode=em20221207-1931&t=23&akid=1931%2E420207%2EJC2_WQ)**
Remember, with you in our movement, there’s nothing we can’t accomplish.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221207-1931-footer&t=24&refcode2=1931_420207_JC2_WQ&akid=1931%2E420207%2EJC2_WQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=1931%2E420207%2EJC2_WQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1931%2E420207%2EJC2_WQ)

name: INCREDIBLE FROM GA (via VPP)
subject: To: Democrat Raphael Warnock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
CONGRATULATIONS! >>
| **BREAKING: Senator Raphael Warnock WINS Georgia Runoff, expanding Senate Majority for Democrats** **Listen, this is a HUGE victory for Democrats and our Senate majority, so we’re sending Warnock a letter from our top grassroots supporters to congratulate him!** [**We’re sending this letter to his office at 8 am tomorrow – so we only have 55 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37305?t=6&akid=5754%2E878179%2EdgcfnR) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37305?t=7&akid=5754%2E878179%2EdgcfnR) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37305?t=8&akid=5754%2E878179%2EdgcfnR)
---
TO: Senator Raphael Warnock
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: CONGRATULATIONS **_Dear Sen. Warnock – CONGRATULATIONS!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the sense of relief we had when we found out you soared to re-election victory last night!**

Georgia is a key battleground state that was absolutely _essential_ for Democrats to hold and expand our fragile Senate majority.

**We know fighting against MAGA extremist Herschel Walker and the MAGA mob’s vicious attacks wasn’t easy — especially in such a close race.**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations!** [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to congratulate you on this outstanding victory and to continue to elect incredible Senate Democrats like you »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37305?t=9&akid=5754%2E878179%2EdgcfnR) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37305?t=10&akid=5754%2E878179%2EdgcfnR) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37305?t=11&akid=5754%2E878179%2EdgcfnR)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5754%2E878179%2EdgcfnR). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5754%2E878179%2EdgcfnR).**
