name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: An unprecedented slowdown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

After Bernie Sanders’ 2016 presidential campaign, a few staffers decided
to continue the work to fight to elect progressives by launching Justice
Democrats. For a team with a small budget, we’ve had quite an impact in
the last few years.

We recruited AOC, Cori Bush, and Jamaal Bowman to run and helped their
campaigns win in competitive primary elections against entrenched
incumbents. And now, this cycle we’ve helped Greg Casar and Summer Lee
win.

But here’s the unfortunate news: we’re facing an unprecedented slowdown in
our fundraising. And as a grassroots supported organization, our
fundraising makes a big impact on the support we’re able to offer our
candidates.

If we don’t turn this around before the end of the year, we’re going to
have to start looking at where to make budget cuts.

Thank you for being a part of this movement to transform the Democratic
Party from the inside out. But we need to ask for your financial support
today:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122747?refcode=em20221207-26445&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=26445%2E1203867%2EfuyTRP ]If you’ve been waiting to make your first contribution to support our
work, this is the best time to pitch in for the first time as we make our
plans for 2023 and set our budget. Will you make a contribution?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122747?refcode=em20221207-26445&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26445%2E1203867%2EfuyTRP ]Contribute $3

Together we will continue to fight for progress for all of our
communities. Whether you can afford to donate today or not, we’re still so
thankful for you,
Peter.

— Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26445%2E1203867%2EfuyTRP ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26445%2E1203867%2EfuyTRP ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221207-26445-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26445_1203867_fuyTRP&akid=26445%2E1203867%2EfuyTRP

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26445%2E1203867%2EfuyTRP

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: What just happened at the Supreme Court:
body:
Our democracy is on the line. | | |
---
| | **We need you to read every word of this email because the ultra-conservative Supreme Court just put our democracy on the line.** Today, SCOTUS heard oral arguments on the Independent State Legislature theory, **which could give state legislatures unchecked power over federal elections without oversight from the state courts and other election officials.** Here’s the truth: This case has major implications for American democracy and the future of elections. **Extremist Republican-controlled state legislatures could have full agency over elections and _force_ their way to victories.** [We need to fight back immediately: Chip in $7 NOW to elect more state Democrats to stop extremist Republicans from destroying our constitutional rights >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xP1bRbO086_ZX-9NTtP6aHbAwXi1YWzwiVR22BOcczmSt0Ch8cc1lIBdJPlwMlnPQR8oQSzYwlwdX-IB59AVlFM8hdbjUkV_oemH2I03T2XZxsHIi9VSKI4epa0GvFNYCmHHt6mw37kDFSQyo6ygZjPmgJZLvSXEZIM8xXC0KQlp8YpeG0tLwLNic7kZc206WAjaSYR6ttUcqPXS_CxuDQrKVz-NeQBF_WVHtKvzXUQqdX_JTx-vAP2mIqYvssGVtAMxfRDlpkfIyg9ei6FzJR53XaojC3ptF_X5Of-yfboTxf30UIfoQSc1ZqbcFC6CMouOQ1iw_EfFlq2fkB86HctGPE5BTHfnXXnNT2uabSrXv1qfk5xamQdOHvNuGcDfNJeXSCXnuVcy_RHjJGZO9d_5SPSo-3gS1HYG21nrA13w/3rs/kIO5oFnPQ6uM7U8S-RlY8w/h0/mZxb8lewStE1VecF5HBF7vO_Bda4mcw81rL3vfXTKg0) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: Our democracy is on the line. | | | | | We need you to read every word of this email because the ultra-conservative Supreme Court just put our democracy on the line. Today, SCOTUS heard oral arguments on the Independent State Legislature theory, which could give state legislatures unchecked power over federal elections without oversight from the state courts and other election officials. Here’s the truth: This case has major implications for American democracy and the future of elections. Extremist Republican-controlled state legislatures could have full agency over elections and force their way to victories. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | While you read this, Trump is continuing to spread false voter fraud claims and spew lies about the results of the midterm elections while beginning his run for President in 2024. If Moore v. Harper implements the radical Independent State Legislature theory, Trump’s dream of overturning the election in 2020 could become a reality in 2024! That’s why we need you to act today -Moore v. Harper has concerning consequences for the 2024 election, potentially leaving the power to decide elections in the hands of state legislators. body:
| | | Fellow American, Will Joe Biden and the Democrats ever take our southern border crisis seriously? Every day we watch DRUGS, GUNS, and even worse, _HUMAN BEINGS_ , trafficked across the border by lawless cartels. The human toll of these _reckless_ policies is incalculable.

U.S. Customs and Border Protection, whose rank-and-file officers have been scapegoated and demoralized by the Biden Administration’s dangerous policies, reported that _DOZENS_ of individuals on the terrorist watch list were captured at the border! The real question is this— if dozens were captured, _how many more got away??_

We need **ACCOUNTABILITY AT THE BORDER** , but we _WON’T_ get it from the Democrats. We must [**HOLD THEM ACCOUNTABLE......**.](http://links.gopwin.org/u/click?_t=880bb7f57f984ec39ea5a13773012007&_m=46339b01e9d24e379fddd5507e064956&_e=3HD2838QDMvJ3mxDX9IiowSfkNwT1F16pnPuZQ-dkq3OKy_2RAPP4HR-KY5w9I9BqETRW9woS9wD62SVDWhBYii00oOCUM3adHJeVExl09eaz7Mmq0b2VJzXSQv7-gzlw2RoTQ2aNYU7q_Xe9txXGL46uoi34LSRGm2fBwLtVZZbdKkBZbeHlOBJaf9bjHzbfC19L31-1i7M-U0lShKnmH2VEDdxOy4OWGHHwsrlRrfYRA6cioHX-MsdmAf2NaYxb6XwQaLgL5Y49MvQfTsxD8yuy-d8vZiUGqgR-_lSgbuVPp9O1U_TzSZO_32stOBZVAPu8ju6vuXUaK3sRayA19UPYtBXV_Dzk-wS0c2jFU0%3D)
